name: Mia Mason
subject: Engaging discussion around the future of the Trans Community, particularly in the workplace.
body:
I'm Speaking tonight with the Maryland LGBT Chamber of Commerce. Please join us at 6:30 PM EST. RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/empowerment-in-act
| | [+1](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=423681.1562.1.86644f558f5e21499dfba38219bee211&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjMwMDY1ODktMTI4NjAxOTI1NTMtNzM3NDdhNDJhODMyZWFkMDc2ZTVhYjQzNzU0NDVkYmRhMDFlYWY2OSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiNDIzNjgxIn0= "Share this on Google+") [in](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=423681.1563.1.4599d869f2ccbc31d0a2a9410a2834e4&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjMwMDY1ODktMTI4NjAxOTI1NTMtNzM3NDdhNDJhODMyZWFkMDc2ZTVhYjQzNzU0NDVkYmRhMDFlYWY2OSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiNDIzNjgxIn0= "Share this on LinkedIn")
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=423681.1564.1.b1b72d7a004eed5d58be66e78529ea19) |
---
I'm Speaking tonight with the Maryland LGBT Chamber of Commerce. Please join us at 6:30 PM EST. RSVP: [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/empowerment-in-action-future-of-the-trans-community-panel-talk-tickets-147801551419](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=423681.1565.1.62a1691f93a25acaccfcc68e12254d66&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MzAwNjU4OS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My03Mzc0N2E0MmE4MzJlYWQwNzZlNWFiNDM3NTQ0NWRiZGEwMWVhZjY5IiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjQyMzY4MSJ9) Engaging discussion around the future of the Trans Community, particularly in the workplace. **About this Event** Moderator Ashley T. Brundage, who speaks locally and nationally about her transition, workplace equality, leadership, and diversity & inclusion, will engage with our four panelists and dives into topics like: What value would you place for businesses to include transgender people? What message would you relay to a trans or nonbinary person hoping to advance in business, whether their own or in one already established? How do we work to expand society's knowledge on topics that might not reach one’s doorstep but too often are at every step for transgender – especially those who are people of color? What’s the most powerful hurdle you’ve encountered, personally or professionally? How did you surmount it? How do we engage more people like ourselves, trans and nonbinary people -- and people different than us -- potential allies -- to be investing in the wellbeing of transgender people? What is one lesson or mantra you carry as inspiration that you would like to share with others as an uplifting encouragement? **Panelists:**
Erica Frazier
Karen Kendra Holmes
Mia Mason
Mateo de la Torre
---
---
**Warm Regards,**
**Mia Mason**
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=423681.1566.1.a7e5c589c95dc7cb7914c527290e38b9 "Facebook") [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=423681.1567.1.b1828eebe94b1f57cf220a58278a13ca "Instagram") [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=423681.1568.1.e703329dfe1481c307d50a57ef549b07 "Twitter") [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=423681.1569.1.8b96db21310b1077fef0041b2a3b49dc "YouTube")

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I Demand Full Transparency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57255613:6O5t3SuPN:m:1:3103520637:65FAB534B8CA1F9AEE3B55C8ADB42930:r "Tweet") Peter, Democrats in Congress are stupefied by a Conservative woman who does the job she was elected to do. I'm Marjorie Taylor Greene, and every time I refuse to sit down and do as I am told, they have to take Joe Biden to a fainting couch. **_First_** , they called me crazy and laughed at everyone who voted for me. **_Then_** , they tried to take me off any committee because I refused to play their games. **In their third act** , 73 Members of Congress tried to expel me from Congress. **_Now_** , they are fundamentally changing the rules of Congress because I believe that the American people deserve full transparency in the House of Representatives. Nancy Pelosi disagrees - if you are standing with her, you can stop reading and go back to your yoga and soymilk retreat. **[If you are standing with the people, then I need to know that you have my back.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57255613:6O5t3SuPN:m:1:3103520637:65FAB534B8CA1F9AEE3B55C8ADB42930:r "If you are standing with the people, then I need to know that you
have my back.")** Joe Biden campaigned on transparency in government, but I am not surprised that he threw it out the window as soon as he got into office. Biden is even delivering a speech to Congress that will be missing most of Congress! He scheduled the speech for a time when most of us will be working in our own districts - and then the Democrat leadership announces that I couldn't come even if I wanted to because of COVID! This is ridiculous! **[If you believe that the House of Representatives belongs to the people, not the elites, I need you to help fund my campaign to make sure I have what I need to keep fighting.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57255613:6O5t3SuPN:m:1:3103520637:65FAB534B8CA1F9AEE3B55C8ADB42930:r "If you believe that the House of Representatives belongs to the
people, not the elites, I need you to help fund my campaign to make sure I have what I need to keep fighting.")** Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are counting on you to shrug your shoulders and stop caring. **I 'm just not built like that - _I still believe America is worth fighting for._** **[I need to know if you feel the same.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57255613:6O5t3SuPN:m:1:3103520637:65FAB534B8CA1F9AEE3B55C8ADB42930:r "I
need to know if you feel the same.")** God Bless America,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57255613:6O5t3SuPN:m:1:3103520637:65FAB534B8CA1F9AEE3B55C8ADB42930:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. This is how tyranny starts - by silencing the people. **[If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57255614:6O5t3SuPN:m:1:3103520637:65FAB534B8CA1F9AEE3B55C8ADB42930:r "If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight
to protect our Constitutional with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** | | [STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57255613:6O5t3SuPN:m:1:3103520637:65FAB534B8CA1F9AEE3B55C8ADB42930:r "STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER")

name: GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy
subject: Fitzgerald standing up to Pelosi, AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
I'm proud to have him on my team. Are YOU with us? [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-miuuyjk-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,As the GOP House Leader, I've got a front row seat to what Nancy Pelosi and AOC are doing to our country.**And I'm so grateful you sent Scott Fitzgerald to Congress to help!**[**Winning these battles in Congress is going to take ALL OF US. The radical left is fired up and supporting their people - will you join me in supporting Scott Fitzgerald?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-miuuyjk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [[ JOIN KEVIN McCARTHY ] - BACK CONGRESSMAN FITZGERALD!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-miuuyjk-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Scott Fitzgerald has been doing **exactly** what you elected him to do.
* In Congress, he's spoken up in committee and on the floor to Back the Badge, secure our elections, and defend our 2nd Amendment rights.
* Across the country, he's supported our campaign efforts to elect Republicans, including the months-long battle to seat Mariannette Miller-Meeks in Iowa.
* And he's helping us **build our WINNING campaign operation to TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY IN 2022!**

But his success has come at a price - Wisconsin Democrats are sure to target him because of his effectiveness _(and because he makes life more difficult for them)!_ That is why we have to prepare him NOW for his re-election. Congressman Fitzgerald has earned my trust and my support, even as a freshman legislator who's only been in Congress a few months.I hope he's earned yours as well. [Click here to join me in supporting Congressman Fitzgerald!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-miuuyjk-ahkdjtlkr-t/)-Kevin McCarthy
House Republican Leader [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-miuuyjk-ahkdjtlkr-i/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-miuuyjk-ahkdjtlkr-d/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-miuuyjk-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-h) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-miuuyjk-ahkdjtlkr-k/)

name: Tim Scott
subject: BIG NEWS: I'm giving the Official GOP Response to Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Peter, I have set an ambitious goal of ACTIVATING 15,000
patriots to stand with me before I give my speech.

Peter,

As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted you to hear this BIG
NEWS from me first.

I will be delivering the Official GOP Response to President
Biden's first address to Congress.

I am grateful and honored to have the opportunity to share my
positive conservative message with millions of Americans.

While I am excited to have this platform, I also know that the
far Left and liberal media are already gearing up to attack me.

Peter, I have set an ambitious goal of ACTIVATING 15,000
patriots to stand with me before I give my speech.

Stand with Me
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_SM-CZ.101461_tim-scott_t1059291-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210423_big-news-im-giving-the-official-gop-response-to-biden/)
A donation of $10, $25, $50 or whatever amount you can afford
will help us prepare for the attacks from the Left.
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_SM-CZ.101461_tim-scott_t1059291-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210423_big-news-im-giving-the-official-gop-response-to-biden/)

You see, the liberal media has always tried to silence my voice.
A Black conservative from South Carolina does not fit the
narrative the media tries to create about the Republican Party.

They don't want to acknowledge the uniquely American journey of
my family-from cotton to Congress in one lifetime.

They don't want to hear my story of growing up in a single-parent
household and nearly failing out of high school, but rising above
it to find success.

They don't want to hear about me becoming the first Black Senator
elected from the South since Reconstruction.

Peter, please dig deep and make whatever donation you can
afford to join our team.
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_SM-CZ.101461_tim-scott_t1059291-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210423_big-news-im-giving-the-official-gop-response-to-biden/)
As I write, I'm sure Democrats and the liberal media are already
attacking me for speaking out about my conservative journey.

I need you to stand with me.

Stand with Me
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_SM-CZ.101461_tim-scott_t1059291-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210423_big-news-im-giving-the-official-gop-response-to-biden/)
Tim Scott

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Defunding The Left
body:
If you're like me, perhaps you wonder sometimes why government regulations and taxes always increase at the expense of hardworking Americans. Why it's so hard to enact commonsense reforms. How people like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, or Diane Feinstein can sleepwalk through the same tired old lies and yet somehow retain power.

The answer: union-backed dark money.

That's why I'm working with the Freedom Foundation to put a stop to the root cause:_the corrupting political power of government unions_. These unions spend untold millions every election cycle to ensure that "their people" stay in office and "their policies" stay in effect.

And where do they get the money for all this cronyism? _Straight from the paychecks of American workers_. The union dues they collect go straight to their political machine.

As I mentioned in my email the other day, I've joined forces with the Freedom Foundation to put a stop to this. In case you missed my email, [be sure to click here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57254554:60xf9SuKN:m:1:3261058643:4D53FC9A876CCAFB8B76F7B3CC2741B0:r) to see a video we produced explaining why I've joined this hard-hitting team of Freedom Fighters.

Americans should be able to decide for _themselves_ how their paycheck is spent, or which political causes they want to support. I believe American _voters_ should have the last word and loudest voice in who represents them--not union officials. I hope you do too.

If we can continue to clamp down on government union political spending, and put that money back in the pockets of middle-class Americans, we can finally level the playing field and ensure that conservative views finally get a fair hearing.

_If you and I can band together today to defund government unions, we can pave the way for conservatives to take back America. That 's the Freedom Foundation's goal._

That's why I hope you will join me in the fight to end the undue influence of government unions. Will you consider making a gift today to support this absolutely crucial work?

Every dollar you can give to the Freedom Foundation results in $24 in funding that the Left will no longer have to prop up left-wing causes that are wrong for America. And, what's more, every dollar you can give today will be MATCHED dollar for dollar by a generous supporter...so every dollar you can give will result in $48 in lost funding to the left.

**I can 't put it more plainly: the more you give, the more the left loses!**

No one is having a bigger impact than the Freedom Foundation in defunding the Left, so please give as generously as you possibly can today!

In freedom,

Alek

PS: If you haven't seen my video yet explaining why I've joined forces with the Freedom Foundation, be sure to [click here and watch it](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57254554:60xf9SuKN:m:1:3261058643:4D53FC9A876CCAFB8B76F7B3CC2741B0:r). Be sure to leave your email address so we can keep you updated on the fight to take back our country from the radical left and the government unions who bankroll them. Thank you!

In case you missed my email, to see a video we produced explaining why I've joined this hard-hitting team of Freedom Fighters. Americans should be able to decide for themselves how their paycheck is spent, or which political causes they want to support. I believe American voters should have the last word and loudest voice in who represents them--not union officials. I hope you do too. If we can continue to clamp down on government union political spending, and put that money back in the pockets of middle-class Americans, we can finally level the playing field and ensure that conservative views finally get a fair hearing. If you and I can band together today to defund government unions, we can pave the way for conservatives to take back America. That 's the Freedom Foundation's goal. That's why I hope you will join me in the fight to end the undue influence of government unions. Will you consider making a gift today to support this absolutely crucial work? Every dollar you can give to the Freedom Foundation results in $24 in funding that the Left will no longer have to prop up left-wing causes that are wrong for America. And, what's more, every dollar you can give today will be MATCHED dollar for dollar by a generous supporter...so every dollar you can give will result in $48 in lost funding to the left. I can 't put it more plainly: the more you give, the more the left loses! No one is having a bigger impact than the Freedom Foundation in defunding the Left, so please give as generously as you possibly can today! In freedom, Alek PS: If you haven't seen my video yet explaining why I've joined forces with the Freedom Foundation, be sure to . Be sure to leave your email address so we can keep you updated on the fight to take back our country from the radical left and the government unions who bankroll them. Thank you! body:

| Peter,
Joe Biden's policies at the border have led to a humanitarian crisis and an all-out border surge.
We need to go back to policies that put America First, not this ruling class mission of throwing the border wide open.
We need to SAVE THE WALL in order to secure our border! [Will you join me today?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-QvVW_2jHRhZzfqEjnDuma1pkz--ow45XbQrb3U8OyAbFT7ToQIefT2uAi15jsbcHAjBXt8NdnyL8F-s64r3iXYFcc3tkn9x-6rywuauk5uW5bdEyFOPberMGogaKslkfBnuA5FQyNQc_NskmOLTso-dbAbffTN7kj0R4H7159X5ddN0X9C-Eg==&c=y8Zg60Z8ATED1Hv66_vCQrcrEaV_GeOnGF8uBCDF2AMTSxE58p_4Yg==&ch=reuiArtCq3foRo7NAoYhmEh61xdKaQVo2HnYcCAxQ4J4eMJ-JeXoQw==&jrc=1)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We need your signature by 9:00p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We need 850 additional patriots to join our "2022 Comeback Team" before midnight tonight to hit our 100,000 petition signature goal. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)
---
**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:** A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our "2022 comeback team" before Biden's first Joint Address to Congress](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back the House next November.

We have less than 12 hours until Biden takes the podium and so far we have collected 99,150 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today **[we need 850 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal before Biden's address tonight.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)
Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn't fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don't do anything dumb. Democrats haven't gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they're acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don't remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They've added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just two months and they're eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)
That's a mistake.

I'm writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year - **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our "2022 comeback team" before Biden's first Joint Address to Congress](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back the House next November.

We have less than 12 hours until Biden takes the podium and so far we have collected 99,150 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today **[we need 850 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal before Biden's address tonight.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We're counting on you to join our cause.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can't block Democrats' pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November's election - they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57935333:WsLJgldNf:m:1:2247059263:46474494B2C26D26CD314D6D92D81B00:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

You were added to the system April 25, 2020.

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: Build Back Blue price tag
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Friend,
I’m so grateful for the response we got last month to our email fundraising program. I know it’s a lot to ask, and the WVDP deeply appreciates all of your continued support. We’re just $3,100 short for our end-of-month goal towards our Build Back Blue program. Can you help us?
Build Back Blue is our coordinated effort across the state, to mobilize Democrats, recruit and train candidates, and register new voters. We are so excited about the current level of enthusiasm – but we need help keeping it fully funded. From printing costs to stamps, everything comes with a price tag and every little bit helps.
Will you show your support for the WVDP’s Build Back Blue program by donating today and helping us reach this important goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/belinda.jpg]

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneralvid [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneralvid]
Peter,
We have two days left to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal and I’m asking for your help. Our Build Back Blue kickoff was a huge success. We premiered our digital attack ad on Bill Lee and in just a few days it has organically reached over 25,000 people! This is just the beginning, and why we need to keep meeting these end-of-month goals. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneralvid]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneralvid [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneralvid]
The more we raise, the more Tennesseans we can reach. It’s pretty hard to defend Bill Lee when you stare the facts in the face. We have $9,240 left to raise and we only have until midnight on Friday. Will you please make a donation if you can, and help us Turn Tennessee Blue in 2022? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneralvid]

This is just the beginning, and why we need to keep meeting these end-of-month goals. [] [] The more we raise, the more Tennesseans we can reach. It’s pretty hard to defend Bill Lee when you stare the facts in the face. We have $9,240 left to raise and we only have until midnight on Friday. Will you please make a donation if you can, and help us Turn Tennessee Blue in 2022? [] [] Thank you, Hendrell Remus [] Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [] P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now. PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States

I’m running for Governor to be that leader and restore NJ to its rightful place as a global leader in industry, innovation, and individual freedom. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hirshsingh/icymi-my-op-ed-on-townhallcom?e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=0bd2258098&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend, In my Op-Ed this morning on [TownHall.com](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2f8814bdae&e=3e017fab0f), I said,

_New Jersey voters cast nearly 350,000 more ballots for President Trump in 2020 than they did in 2016 – even with the dubious mail-in voting practices put in place at the 11th hour by Democrat Governor Phil Murphy._

While most of our so-called Republican leaders were silent on Murphy's shenanigans, I took him to court and fought to hold him accountable when no one else would.

Now these same Republican "leaders" are falling-in line behind a failed, self-proclaimed moderate Republican who has called President Trump a "charlatan" and who said the 2020 election was "fair."

But you can learn more about my conservative platform of lower taxes, reduced state spending, school choice, fair elections, and the unequivocal protection of our God-given rights to life, liberty, property, self-defense,

Read my [Op-Ed](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=cd3aeaa669&e=3e017fab0f) and join my campaign today!
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Republican for NJ Governor

name: Greater Georgia
subject: LOEFFLER CALLS FOR INVESTIGATION TO HOLD GEORGIA’S TOP ELECTION OFFICIAL ACCOUNTABLE, REBUILD FAITH IN ELECTIONS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, APRIL 28, 2021
LOEFFLER CALLS FOR INVESTIGATION TO HOLD GEORGIA'S TOP ELECTION OFFICIAL ACCOUNTABLE, REBUILD FAITH IN ELECTIONS
ATLANTA - Today, Kelly Loeffler sent a letter to Georgia Attorney General Chris Carr asking him to open an investigation into whether Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger used his constitutional office overseeing elections in Georgia to further his own political self-interests in violation of the Georgia Constitution or statutes. Secretary Raffensperger made unprecedented changes to the state's elections in 2020 amid the pandemic, including the mass mailing of unsolicited absentee ballot requests, entering into a consent decree without the legislature's awareness, accepting millions in outside money, and failing to resolve hundreds of open investigations from the primary and general elections. Loeffler's letter seeks accountability and transparency from the state's top elections official to help restore confidence in our elections.
"Georgians deserve to have confidence that their vote counts - but for too many in our state, that still is not the case," said Kelly Loeffler, Chairwoman of Greater Georgia. "The passage of the Election Integrity Act is an important step toward restoring that confidence, though numerous questions remain unanswered from the Secretary of State's role in overseeing the 2020 elections. This request is not about the outcome of an election, but about the loss of confidence in our elections and the importance of holding elected officials accountable for upholding the law and carrying out their constitutional duties. Greater Georgia will continue to fight for more transparency, accountability, and integrity in our elections to ensure voters are heard."
To read the full letter, see below or click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013uDVaAW8RtByRbelf72Qct_0uMq50grYKSbxPc7O5_uq-OO3mi7hHZwcmXanZD2YcEZBJm2y7klvSmm3FAEtKhDXB86FltlC1_WZUfylrZQqabpCUwx2QkTPK2MmJ7r-EkTcUbNwW7CYlPQ0tUXG24hOlLCxHDYDxhIlHdw2pOeYIJ_z3fui0_gWKVYTBz3bGp2py0rl201Q07KItmAy6X5cfB6qLBCTsT647ADi-40=&c=NBSgjxJtMZY0_tOUXO9KSFC0FXovLuExXpUjrMo-oqn7qO6kfGfaAg==&ch=R3154HgPXvaaNQ1Fz7ASKtZ_CRekhZJCIVNKo-wc9meRjbWLBnilVQ==&jrc=1).
---
| | |
---
| April 28, 2021 The Honorable Chris Carr Attorney General Office of the Attorney General 40 Capitol Square, SW Atlanta, GA 30334 Dear Attorney General Carr: I write to request an investigation into whether actions taken by Brad Raffensperger (hereinafter "Secretary Raffensperger"), in his capacity as Secretary of State of Georgia, put his political self-interest ahead of the people of Georgia in conducting elections, and whether these actions constitute a conflict of interest in violation of the Georgia Constitution and/or statutes. Since his term began in January 2019, Secretary Raffensperger has made unprecedented changes to elections in his constitutional duty to conduct elections, including those actions outlined below, which have reduced trust and transparency. Secretary Raffensperger politicized and minimized voters' legitimate concerns about changes to Georgia's elections which were related to the pandemic and legal settlements, failed to complete investigations and provide timely information, and engaged in political matters during an election. This request is not about the outcome of an election, but about the loss of confidence in our elections and the importance of holding elected officials accountable for upholding the law and carrying out their constitutional duties. If voters don't trust the electoral process and their elected officials, we risk sustained damage to voter participation in our state. We saw the impact of reduced faith in elections in the Senate runoffs, when over 339,000 Republican voters who voted in November did not vote in January. Voting rights are not a partisan issue, and the loss of electoral confidence disenfranchises voters of any political affiliation. Following are examples of potential conflicts of interest that furthered Secretary Raffensperger's own self-interests: 1) Georgia's primary election on June 9, 2020 was administered so poorly the Georgia House Governmental Affairs Committee was tasked with investigating the election. The investigation identified the following: (i) multiple issues related to absentee ballots; (ii) inadequate training for the new voting machines; and (iii) procedural issues regarding COVID-19. Secretary Raffensperger glossed over these issues and failed to take sufficient corrective or legal actions prior to either the general election or run-off election.[1] 2) Secretary Raffensperger announced on September 8, 2020 approximately 1,000 individuals faced investigation for double voting in the primary election by casting both an absentee ballot and voting in person. Eight months and two elections later, Secretary Raffensperger has not fully resolved the double voting issues.[2] 3) Secretary Raffensperger entered into a Compromise Settlement Agreement and Release ("Consent Decree") on March 6, 2020 that materially altered the signature verification process for absentee ballot review--without informing the Georgia General Assembly or the general public--just weeks prior to mailing out mass, unsolicited absentee ballot requests statewide. He later claimed in media interviews the settlement did not materially change the absentee ballot signature review process, yet the administrative process for rejecting ballots was increased. 4) According to a March 26, 2021 report, Secretary Raffensperger's office accepted unregulated, outside funds totaling $5.59 million from the Center for Election Innovation & Research ("CEIR"), an organization linked to Facebook founder Mark Zuckerberg. According to CEIR, Secretary Raffensperger's office used the funds in both the general and runoff elections to conduct messaging, including to "counteract disinformation" by issuing "public service" announcements.[3] Separately, CEIR also gave millions of dollars in grants to certain Georgia counties. 5) In his role as Chair of the State Board of Elections, Secretary Raffensperger made sweeping, poorly communicated, and inconsistently applied changes to critical elections procedures including, but not limited to: (i) permitting unsecure drop boxes whose number varied across the state, with some counties having dozens and others having none, and (ii) mass unsolicited absentee ballot request mailings, which unlocked the potential for fraud.[4] 6) Secretary Raffensperger's office orchestrated the recording of a call with the President of the United States and subsequently released the recording to the Washington Post just days before the January runoff, interfering with an election that was already underway by reducing faith in the process and eroding trust in our election officials. 7) Six months after the general election, the status of hundreds of primary and general elections investigations allegedly opened by the Secretary of State's office remains unknown. Additionally, no investigations relating the runoff elections have been announced by his office. Georgians deserve answers regarding these issues and to understand the impact these and other matters may have on future elections. Failure to acknowledge these issues and irregularities will lead to a continued loss of trust in our elections. For that trust to be restored, there must be accountability from Secretary Raffensperger in his role managing our elections, and whether he has served his own self-interest by attempting to protect his own political career. Accordingly, we respectfully request an investigation into whether Secretary Raffensperger's actions were lawful and consistent with his fiduciary and statutory obligations to Georgia's citizenry as a statewide elected official under the Georgia Constitution and law. Respectfully, Kelly Loeffler
-------------------
[1] See Primary Elections Investigation, House of Representatives Government Affairs Committee, available at: [https://www.house.ga.gov/Documents/CommitteeDocuments/2020/GovernmentalAffairs/Elections_Investigation_Report.pdf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013uDVaAW8RtByRbelf72Qct_0uMq50grYKSbxPc7O5_uq-OO3mi7hHZwcmXanZD2YnBWzc2t5CzA8k0c-WM5nQQ8VqkxD2uczDluAoh6voEb58pm_btQbLUVYEh62xS483Rr4RnJthyEaG36G5lxYzaEbphnF_CyB5DgewDqLpzibal2ZWu07kGs6UPT4uftdXeuEmQG3RmUKE6FPCZ9VwhG99SnxHoJECD65jMASLMIlhtwVtPhAa3ecgrSewZYN5fVupYJpj1Xb-cDyzj9lXw==&c=NBSgjxJtMZY0_tOUXO9KSFC0FXovLuExXpUjrMo-oqn7qO6kfGfaAg==&ch=R3154HgPXvaaNQ1Fz7ASKtZ_CRekhZJCIVNKo-wc9meRjbWLBnilVQ==&jrc=1) (last accessed April 22, 2021). clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, APRIL 28, 2021 LOEFFLER CALLS FOR INVESTIGATION TO HOLD GEORGIA'S TOP ELECTION OFFICIAL ACCOUNTABLE, REBUILD FAITH IN ELECTIONS ATLANTA - Today, Kelly Loeffler sent a letter to Georgia Attorney General Chris Carr asking him to open an investigation into whether Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger used his constitutional office overseeing elections in Georgia to further his own political self-interests in violation of the Georgia Constitution or statutes. Secretary Raffensperger made unprecedented changes to the state's elections in 2020 amid the pandemic, including the mass mailing of unsolicited absentee ballot requests, entering into a consent decree without the legislature's awareness, accepting millions in outside money, and failing to resolve hundreds of open investigations from the primary and general elections. Loeffler's letter seeks accountability and transparency from the state's top elections official to help restore confidence in our elections. "Georgians deserve to have confidence that their vote counts - but for too many in our state, that still is not the case," said Kelly Loeffler, Chairwoman of Greater Georgia. "The passage of the Election Integrity Act is an important step toward restoring that confidence, though numerous questions remain unanswered from the Secretary of State's role in overseeing the 2020 elections. This request is not about the outcome of an election, but about the loss of confidence in our elections and the importance of holding elected officials accountable for upholding the law and carrying out their constitutional duties. Greater Georgia will continue to fight for more transparency, accountability, and integrity in our elections to ensure voters are heard." To read the full letter, see below or click . | | | | April 28, 2021 The Honorable Chris Carr Attorney General Office of the Attorney General 40 Capitol Square, SW Atlanta, GA 30334 Dear Attorney General Carr: I write to request an investigation into whether actions taken by Brad Raffensperger (hereinafter "Secretary Raffensperger"), in his capacity as Secretary of State of Georgia, put his political self-interest ahead of the people of Georgia in conducting elections, and whether these actions constitute a conflict of interest in violation of the Georgia Constitution and/or statutes. Since his term began in January 2019, Secretary Raffensperger has made unprecedented changes to elections in his constitutional duty to conduct elections, including those actions outlined below, which have reduced trust and transparency. Secretary Raffensperger politicized and minimized voters' legitimate concerns about changes to Georgia's elections which were related to the pandemic and legal settlements, failed to complete investigations and provide timely information, and engaged in political matters during an election. This request is not about the outcome of an election, but about the loss of confidence in our elections and the importance of holding elected officials accountable for upholding the law and carrying out their constitutional duties. If voters don't trust the electoral process and their elected officials, we risk sustained damage to voter participation in our state. We saw the impact of reduced faith in elections in the Senate runoffs, when over 339,000 Republican voters who voted in November did not vote in January. Voting rights are not a partisan issue, and the loss of electoral confidence disenfranchises voters of any political affiliation. Following are examples of potential conflicts of interest that furthered Secretary Raffensperger's own self-interests: 1) Georgia's primary election on June 9, 2020 was administered so poorly the Georgia House Governmental Affairs Committee was tasked with investigating the election. The investigation identified the following: (i) multiple issues related to absentee ballots; (ii) inadequate training for the new voting machines; and (iii) procedural issues regarding COVID-19. Secretary Raffensperger glossed over these issues and failed to take sufficient corrective or legal actions prior to either the general election or run-off election.[1] 2) Secretary Raffensperger announced on September 8, 2020 approximately 1,000 individuals faced investigation for double voting in the primary election by casting both an absentee ballot and voting in person. Eight months and two elections later, Secretary Raffensperger has not fully resolved the double voting issues.[2] 3) Secretary Raffensperger entered into a Compromise Settlement Agreement and Release ("Consent Decree") on March 6, 2020 that materially altered the signature verification process for absentee ballot review--without informing the Georgia General Assembly or the general public--just weeks prior to mailing out mass, unsolicited absentee ballot requests statewide. He later claimed in media interviews the settlement did not materially change the absentee ballot signature review process, yet the administrative process for rejecting ballots was increased. 4) According to a March 26, 2021 report, Secretary Raffensperger's office accepted unregulated, outside funds totaling $5.59 million from the Center for Election Innovation & Research ("CEIR"), an organization linked to Facebook founder Mark Zuckerberg. According to CEIR, Secretary Raffensperger's office used the funds in both the general and runoff elections to conduct messaging, including to "counteract disinformation" by issuing "public service" announcements.[3] Separately, CEIR also gave millions of dollars in grants to certain Georgia counties. 5) In his role as Chair of the State Board of Elections, Secretary Raffensperger made sweeping, poorly communicated, and inconsistently applied changes to critical elections procedures including, but not limited to: (i) permitting unsecure drop boxes whose number varied across the state, with some counties having dozens and others having none, and (ii) mass unsolicited absentee ballot request mailings, which unlocked the potential for fraud.[4] 6) Secretary Raffensperger's office orchestrated the recording of a call with the President of the United States and subsequently released the recording to the Washington Post just days before the January runoff, interfering with an election that was already underway by reducing faith in the process and eroding trust in our election officials. 7) Six months after the general election, the status of hundreds of primary and general elections investigations allegedly opened by the Secretary of State's office remains unknown. Additionally, no investigations relating the runoff elections have been announced by his office. Georgians deserve answers regarding these issues and to understand the impact these and other matters may have on future elections. Failure to acknowledge these issues and irregularities will lead to a continued loss of trust in our elections. For that trust to be restored, there must be accountability from Secretary Raffensperger in his role managing our elections, and whether he has served his own self-interest by attempting to protect his own political career. Accordingly, we respectfully request an investigation into whether Secretary Raffensperger's actions were lawful and consistent with his fiduciary and statutory obligations to Georgia's citizenry as a statewide elected official under the Georgia Constitution and law. Respectfully, Kelly Loeffler [1] See Primary Elections Investigation, House of Representatives Government Affairs Committee, available at: (last accessed April 22, 2021). [2] 1,000 people double-voted in Georgia primary, says secretary of state, The Atlanta Journal-Constitution (September 8, 2020), available at: . [3] See The Center for Election Innovation & Research 2020 Voter Education Grant Program, March 26, 2021, available at: (last accessed April 22, 2021). [4] See SEB Rule 183-1-14-0.80.14, available at . | Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Tim Scott
subject: Disgusting display of casual racism from the media
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
****You are receiving this email because our records indicate you are a supporter of the Republican Party. You can[unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9491908/224717773/2036/2/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk0OTE5MDg%3d&x=8f637aa7) at any time.****
****

The mainstream has decided to fact-check my family's story of "cotton to Congress in one lifetime." That's right, The Washington Post has been investigating my family's history in the South and downplaying the struggles and racism they faced.

Friend,

The mainstream media has decided to fact-check my family's story of "cotton to Congress in one lifetime."

That's right, The Washington Post has been investigating my family's history in the South and downplaying the struggles and racism they faced.

**It 's shameful. Plain and simple.**

I am used to being attacked for daring to think differently, for daring to be a proud black conservative, and for daring to publicly stand up for what I believe.

But this latest attack from the mainstream media represents a new low -- even for them.

We should never allow this type of casual racism to go unanswered -- **I hope you agree we can do better.**
_****_
[STAND WITH ME](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9491908/224717773/199025/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=9444d11b)
---

Let me explain. My family's journey is a complicated one, records weren't kept, and family history was passed down from generation to generation through storytelling.

But no amount of "fact-checking" or attacks from the mainstream media will EVER take away from the struggles that my family overcame.

My grandfather grew up a poor South Carolina cotton farmer in the Great Depression. Yet he lived long enough to see his grandson become the first African American elected to both the U.S. House and Senate.

He lived long enough to see his wildest dreams become a reality. From cotton to Congress in one lifetime!

We have to call out this casual racism against black Republicans when we see it. It's shameful and we cannot allow it to go unnoticed.
_****_
[STAND WITH ME](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9491908/224717773/199025/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=d42b3b00)
---

I wake up every single day working to ensure that future generations have the same opportunities that I did to succeed.

Every time I see a nasty insult from the Left or an unjust "fact-check," I am comforted knowing that there are patriots like you who have my back.

Sadly, this won't be the last time we face insults, casual racism, or attacks from the Left. [**But with your help we can continue spreading the positive message of conservatism.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9491908/224717773/199026/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=a25c346c)
_****_
[STAND WITH ME](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9491908/224717773/199025/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=76fa5bd2)
---

Artis Ware's Proud Grandson,

Senator Tim Scott

PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9491908/224717773/17144/7/)

**Democrats are trying to destroy our way of life, and we simply cannot stand for it. **

AOC and friends reintroduced the Green New Deal last week, and it's the most radical climate agenda America has ever seen.

**Among my main concerns with this thoughtless plan is its blatant attempt to decimate animal agriculture. Eliminating this would be an absolute disaster. **

**The livelihoods of farmers and ranchers across Iowa and our great country are at risk. **

[**I 'm counting on you to stand with me TODAY against the Democrats' reckless climate agenda, Friend. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q8lY-MU-EmeHsGbeNVlaYdU89OFYzOVwMMFPkXqYWFMRmgkcvMTLQSvNM5pOL8forB_evxYgpmFA4rLWoaUe8rYuOCiV7YtZANoNvLQzUm_Efc9rTY7AKBdcK8ReY358DoCKnLJ3L2d8Pjl8kInXAM5KcxLKSAzLPSEIEsNcJnYOWNqwwtkGXc2UOkW9r5kNInzwks5JXtxC4Fy02_Q5o6gtkL1jsCMZd3jwvL_5Zlk2z0afzHo95CsZ5tVPW5nj_2rQkM0rqu_jRSja1ua19Xr72hiyQAaRthAvuug0iJ_5x0d_Io0mSVHIl9gEx2gZGFZUGt93se__ShTVotmqs4Fl_JmAwnI36rjRc7vUYG0DBwE8_J4GjcLUA3D1M-qgG7Y__Tu2KbKTih4S4mi-N5QPqAHAAZZmWRlv4MjPXZr0m2BY3lNOZw_WE739ENyuJ633cQd-A15MG9DOcD6Jy78bSrTb4GdYpxr9bCKmyeoD90ieFIjgLg==&c=s5CEP7gKtv2rE2afIMcFKYDdtTr9IbdsNmaB9WtjEm1NE_9GB6ITmg==&ch=EQW6euAJDZkAoySTLdJT1Y6Ow8pod5l7JhAy0bZZ6PHCDYt681bWjA==)
---
_Tom Emmer reached out ...
Marco Rubio reached out...
Now, it's my turn..._ My friend Young Kim's seat is in serious jeopardy. Not only did the Left just declare her as TOP TARGET, but she's on the brink of MISSING her critical end-of-month fundraising goal. **If that happens, she will be DEFENSELESS against their attacks.** I assure you Young Kim is worthy of your support. She is a proven conservative who always puts Americans' interests first -- fighting to create affordable healthcare, lower taxes, supporting small businesses, advocating for our nation's veterans, and working to boost our economy. It is a privilege to work alongside her, and with your help, I can continue. She's 64 donations behind and I'm stepping in to help her achieve this critical fundraising goal to get her across the finish line. [**Will you join me in supporting Young Kim?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q8lY-MU-EmeHsGbeNVlaYdU89OFYzOVwMMFPkXqYWFMRmgkcvMTLQSvNM5pOL8forB_evxYgpmFA4rLWoaUe8rYuOCiV7YtZANoNvLQzUm_Efc9rTY7AKBdcK8ReY358DoCKnLJ3L2d8Pjl8kInXAM5KcxLKSAzLPSEIEsNcJnYOWNqwwtkGXc2UOkW9r5kNInzwks5JXtxC4Fy02_Q5o6gtkL1jsCMZd3jwvL_5Zlk2z0afzHo95CsZ5tVPW5nj_2rQkM0rqu_jRSja1ua19Xr72hiyQAaRthAvuug0iJ_5x0d_Io0mSVHIl9gEx2gZGFZUGt93se__ShTVotmqs4Fl_JmAwnI36rjRc7vUYG0DBwE8_J4GjcLUA3D1M-qgG7Y__Tu2KbKTih4S4mi-N5QPqAHAAZZmWRlv4MjPXZr0m2BY3lNOZw_WE739ENyuJ633cQd-A15MG9DOcD6Jy78bSrTb4GdYpxr9bCKmyeoD90ieFIjgLg==&c=s5CEP7gKtv2rE2afIMcFKYDdtTr9IbdsNmaB9WtjEm1NE_9GB6ITmg==&ch=EQW6euAJDZkAoySTLdJT1Y6Ow8pod5l7JhAy0bZZ6PHCDYt681bWjA==) | [**SUPPORT YOUNG KIM & CONSERVATIVE WOMEN**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q8lY-MU-EmeHsGbeNVlaYdU89OFYzOVwMMFPkXqYWFMRmgkcvMTLQSvNM5pOL8forB_evxYgpmFA4rLWoaUe8rYuOCiV7YtZANoNvLQzUm_Efc9rTY7AKBdcK8ReY358DoCKnLJ3L2d8Pjl8kInXAM5KcxLKSAzLPSEIEsNcJnYOWNqwwtkGXc2UOkW9r5kNInzwks5JXtxC4Fy02_Q5o6gtkL1jsCMZd3jwvL_5Zlk2z0afzHo95CsZ5tVPW5nj_2rQkM0rqu_jRSja1ua19Xr72hiyQAaRthAvuug0iJ_5x0d_Io0mSVHIl9gEx2gZGFZUGt93se__ShTVotmqs4Fl_JmAwnI36rjRc7vUYG0DBwE8_J4GjcLUA3D1M-qgG7Y__Tu2KbKTih4S4mi-N5QPqAHAAZZmWRlv4MjPXZr0m2BY3lNOZw_WE739ENyuJ633cQd-A15MG9DOcD6Jy78bSrTb4GdYpxr9bCKmyeoD90ieFIjgLg==&c=s5CEP7gKtv2rE2afIMcFKYDdtTr9IbdsNmaB9WtjEm1NE_9GB6ITmg==&ch=EQW6euAJDZkAoySTLdJT1Y6Ow8pod5l7JhAy0bZZ6PHCDYt681bWjA==)
---

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Finance Team, Team RonJon
subject: We are almost there!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
It's been an incredible month, capped off by President Trump's endorsement

Friend,
Time is running out and we are SO INCREDIBLY CLOSE to hitting our **End Of Month Goal!** It's been an incredible month, capped off by President Trump's endorsement. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Keller is the right leader for Albuquerque
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28345503/282952709/-272948131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODAyYWMyNy00NmE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEkQbMNulOeCaW2kpzknp66rLLQXnepSUYnG-ero9wI=&emci=ea417dfe-37a8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=8802ac27-46a8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=252045)
---
Dear friend — I fight for New Mexicans every day in the nation’s capital. To be most effective, I need partners at home. **Tim Keller is the kind of leader and partner Albuquerque needs.** Tim shares my deep commitment to ensuring all of us have the opportunity to succeed. He’s who I trust and depend on. Throughout the COVD-19 pandemic, Tim has forged an innovative and meaningful response for Albuquerque residents that has saved lives and livelihoods. Under Tim's leadership, the city has ramped up services and programs — delivering over half a million meals for seniors, $12 million in grants to local businesses, and over half a million hours in childcare to frontline workers. He also directed assistance to families for rent and utilities and expedited $170 million in construction projects. I got my start in elected office as a City Councilor in Albuquerque. I know how important it is that our city has the right leader. Tim has led when it mattered most. He has been the right leader for Albuquerque during his current term, and he remains the right leader for us in the coming years. And while we work to pass the For the People Act to get big money out of national politics, Tim is pushing hard to keep special interests out of our local elections by seeking and championing public financing. [**Will you join Julie and I in contributing $5 and signing Mayor Tim Kellers’s petition so he can qualify for public financing?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28345504/282952710/1557401118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODAyYWMyNy00NmE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEkQbMNulOeCaW2kpzknp66rLLQXnepSUYnG-ero9wI=&emci=ea417dfe-37a8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=8802ac27-46a8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=252045) | [CONTRIBUTE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28345505/282952711/1557401118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODAyYWMyNy00NmE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEkQbMNulOeCaW2kpzknp66rLLQXnepSUYnG-ero9wI=&emci=ea417dfe-37a8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=8802ac27-46a8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=252045)
---
Your senator,
— Martin Heinrich
P.S. Public financing relies very heavily on community involvement. Already gave your $5? You can sign up to find ten of your friends or neighbors to donate and keep special interests out of Albuquerque’s elections.
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---

clean_body: Dear friend — I fight for New Mexicans every day in the nation’s capital. To be most effective, I need partners at home. Tim Keller is the kind of leader and partner Albuquerque needs. Tim shares my deep commitment to ensuring all of us have the opportunity to succeed. He’s who I trust and depend on. Throughout the COVD-19 pandemic, Tim has forged an innovative and meaningful response for Albuquerque residents that has saved lives and livelihoods. Under Tim's leadership, the city has ramped up services and programs — delivering over half a million meals for seniors, $12 million in grants to local businesses, and over half a million hours in childcare to frontline workers. He also directed assistance to families for rent and utilities and expedited $170 million in construction projects. I got my start in elected office as a City Councilor in Albuquerque. I know how important it is that our city has the right leader. Tim has led when it mattered most. He has been the right leader for Albuquerque during his current term, and he remains the right leader for us in the coming years. And while we work to pass the For the People Act to get big money out of national politics, Tim is pushing hard to keep special interests out of our local elections by seeking and championing public financing. | Your senator, — Martin Heinrich P.S. Public financing relies very heavily on community involvement. Already gave your $5? You can sign up to find ten of your friends or neighbors to donate and keep special interests out of Albuquerque’s elections. | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. * Introduced an “infrastructure plan” that hardly covers ANY plan for infrastructure
* And they’re trying to make D.C. - our Capital city - into a STATE.

That’s why we MUST stand strong and continue our efforts to shake up Washington, friend. name: Tom Cotton
subject: $15,600 debit cards for illegal immigrants?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57255530:Jnr15SuNi:m:3:3206719985:90523950AFDD604D4F2F4644C454E4E2:r

Peter - Democrats rammed a massive $1.9 trillion, so-called
"COVID relief" bill through Congress.
Now, liberal states want to use that money to give $15,600 debit
cards to illegal immigrants.

I'm taking action to stop this, and I wanted you to be one of the
first to hear about it.

My plan - the No Bailouts for Illegal Aliens Act - would require
states to certify they aren't offering bailouts to illegal
aliens.I'm looking for 750 Patriots to chip in $35 to support my
continued fight against the Radical Left!
(https://secure.winred.com/tom-cotton/no-illegal-immigrant-bailouts/?utm_campaign=20210425_SM-CZ.101461_tom-cotton_t1059323-1150&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210425_15600-debit-cards-for-illegal-immigrants/?amount=35)
Can I count on you, Peter?
(https://secure.winred.com/tom-cotton/no-illegal-immigrant-bailouts/?utm_campaign=20210425_SM-CZ.101461_tom-cotton_t1059323-1150&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210425_15600-debit-cards-for-illegal-immigrants)

NO BAILOUTS FOR ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS
(https://secure.winred.com/tom-cotton/no-illegal-immigrant-bailouts/?utm_campaign=20210425_SM-CZ.101461_tom-cotton_t1059323-1150&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210425_15600-debit-cards-for-illegal-immigrants)
Joe Biden and the Democrats have put illegals first and Americans
last at every turn.

Now, liberals are sending illegals a message that it even pays to
break the law... and you're the one paying for it!

We should put Americans first. And we should never use taxpayer
dollars to give bonus payments to illegal immigrants...let alone
debit cards worth $15,600.

The No Bailouts for Illegal Aliens Act will stop this insanity by
forcing states to certify they aren't bailing out illegals - but
with Democrats holding all the power in Washington, it's going to
take a grassroots movement to get this done.

That's why I'm personally asking you to take a stand with me
against the socialist agenda the Democrats keep trying to push
through Congress. Will you join me now?
(https://secure.winred.com/tom-cotton/no-illegal-immigrant-bailouts/?utm_campaign=20210425_SM-CZ.101461_tom-cotton_t1059323-1150&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210425_15600-debit-cards-for-illegal-immigrants)

Let's put Americans - not illegals - first.

In

That's why I'm personally asking you to take a stand with me against the socialist agenda the Democrats keep trying to push through Congress. Will you join me now? () Let's put Americans - not illegals - first. body:
This is Steve Baccus, lifelong Kansan and former President of Kansas Farm Bureau. Today, I’m proud to announce my endorsement of Derek Schmidt for Friend, This is Steve Baccus, lifelong Kansan and former President of Kansas Farm Bureau. Today, I’m proud to announce my endorsement of Derek Schmidt for the next Governor of Kansas. Our rural communities need someone in Topeka who will keep their priorities at the forefront of his work, and I am confident Derek is the best person for the job. Friend, over the years I have worked with some of our state’s strongest and most-effective voices for rural Kansas--respected conservative leaders like Bob Dole, Pat Roberts, Jerry Moran and of course Derek Schmidt! I will be the first to tell you that because of my many years of knowing and working with Derek, I know he is the proven WINNER that Kansas needs right here, right now. If you agree that we need a leader who will support our communities, will you consider lending a hand to Derek’s campaign? [**JOIN DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=bf0c1db084f6476880fc11212061cfda&_e=4BUWdrDYW_0AaH_sEm0pzWUFzx3wc0BoSqDLmJyegk0_x24FqY6UEqbaUOCPEnPXp3RFBXh4mGaXKoxdePh6k4Lju-Oy4ztfK5jJBeuRP0noF0ntpPSMAPSRoXsLxtAWt2oXozZQAiCuDyTmA1xucypdBDXGGM1AwTMtkAsUf7LCltvVVbnuvVphu-d83DQ3q8qzR74MTAX913AUv8pszHmaUZWT1lcGRwg9FHMmwNmg54YljYspA2Em8QHK3LTcBrcXTCd78kbfJ8WPp_Bn2-bPw_zCnGKlH9Kpu489J65JyQmvauGsPnOzo3QaO465ZZp-hkii4ixCLWtpkiBTXMtegLrxEy7CRjLdB0UAD8e8J1Wd4MRJXJ12Lq9D8YkA2RPxrtf6tvP2et5d6DwDITsE62AFlwnkXULsQr7FloSJGZ3prufPjkHxtswd9Emo) As the former President of Kansas Farm Bureau, I know firsthand that agriculture is the lifeblood of our great state. That’s why we need a trusted leader like Derek Schmidt who understands our values and our way of life. While serving as Attorney General, Derek has always had the back of farmers and ranchers. He pushed back against illegal federal regulations like the Waters of the United States (WOTUS) rule--and he won! Derek has always fought to ensure that Kansas agriculture can thrive without unconstitutional interference from Washington bureaucrats! He was a trusted leader for agriculture when he served as Chairman of the Kansas Senate Agriculture Committee. I know that as Governor, Derek will always stand up for our rural communities. name: Tom Fitton
subject: America’s best bet to get to the truth!
body:
Because standing strong now is the most important thing you can do to defend the rule of law under the U.S. Constitution

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

_Today, Judicial Watch is the largest and most effective government watchdog group in America._ No one is doing more to protect the rule of law, uncover unlawful government secrecy and challenge serious abuses of power:

* Judicial Watch has filed 7 lawsuits against government agencies to get to more evidence about the corrupt Hunter Biden-Burisma Holdings relationship that then-Vice President Joe Biden's used American aid dollars to try to quash the investigation of Burisma by the Ukrainian government. And we're putting this same level of focus on Biden family corruption in China!

* Judicial Watch lawyers continue to fight voter fraud, which liberals want to pretend doesn't exist. We continue to build on our record of successful litigation in Ohio, Kentucky and California with our current clean-voter roll-related lawsuits in Colorado, Illinois, North Carolina and Pennsylvania. _We are also closely monitoring H.R. 1, the congressional Left 's massive power grab that would federalize our election law and demolish many existing election integrity safeguards_ - _especially Voter ID_!

* Judicial Watch's lawsuit against _San Francisco 's infamous and deadly "sanctuary" policy that allows illegal aliens to avoid deportation_ revealed that more than 2,400 _criminal illegal aliens_ were released under the San Francisco Police Department's dangerous and unlawful policy on communications with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE)!

* Judicial Watch is fighting to protect the First Amendment rights of non-profit donors across America from a new California law which "_compels the disclosure of certain organization 's donors [to its state government]." _This attack on First Amendment rights, which will target and expose donors to conservative groups, is being challenged all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court. In March, Judicial Watch filed an _amicus_ ("friend of the court") brief, asking the High Court to take up this case and overturn the California law.

Clearly, this is all critically important work. _And your Judicial Watch is America 's best (some would say only) bet to get to the truth on these and other important matters_. But we are already carrying the largest investigation and litigation caseload in our 27-year history, and we cannot do it without you.
**_[For us to be fully prepared and effective at this critical time, I ask that you make your best contribution to Judicial Watch right now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53541&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjgxNDMzMDc=)_**
The pressures on us right now are tremendous, as we are literally doing the law enforcement work that the Biden Justice Department and FBI, the corrupted media and the compromised Congress _won 't do_.
That's why **_[your donation today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53541&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjgxNDMzMDc=)_** is so important. Thank you!
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President
P.S. I _know_ you share our commitment to fighting public corruption and standing firm for the rule of law. That's why I hope you can **_[make your best donation to Judicial Watch right now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53541&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjgxNDMzMDc=)_**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53541&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjgxNDMzMDc=)

name: Kevin Hern
subject: The results are in…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8c7aadf69d9da1f0/d6dfc33ca5a5c535c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter,
When I asked for submissions of energy hypocrites for my “Friend of Fossil Fuels” award, you delivered.
Over the last month, I’ve received an overwhelming amount of submissions. You’ve sent in celebrities, politicians, woke companies, even your neighbors! But one name has popped up more than anyone else: John Kerry.
**John Kerry is exactly the kind of climate hypocrite that angers Americans, and he embodies everything I had in mind when I created the “Friend of Fossil Fuels” award.**
Kerry stands on his bully pulpit to preach clean energy and shames hard-working Americans for living our lives and utilizing the affordable and reliable energy sources that we have at our disposal. Meanwhile, he’s living a life of luxury – flying in private jets, driving around in gas-guzzling Suburbans, and powering his many mansions with a carbon footprint larger than many small countries.
As Biden’s Climate Envoy, Kerry demonizes traditional energy sources, like fossil fuel. But did you know that fossil fuel is one of the cleanest sources of reliable energy?
Just last week, I brought 17 Members of Congress home to Tulsa, where we met with leading executives from Oklahoma’s energy sector and learned about our state’s successful all-of-the-above approach to energy. Our grid is powered by a combination of coal, hydro, natural gas, solar, and more. This creates a clean and reliable – and most importantly, affordable – energy system for Oklahoma families and businesses.
Oklahoma is the number 2 state in clean energy production! We know a thing or two about energy, which is why _**I’m extending an open invitation to John Kerry to come here and learn how our system works.**_
I’m glad to give John Kerry the credit he deserves as our nation’s leading climate hypocrite. Thank you for your submissions – I’m going to make this an annual award, so keep in mind who you want to see named next year’s “Friend of Fossil Fuels”.
In the meantime, I’m working hard in Congress to promote all-of-the-above energy policies and protect the high-paying energy jobs Biden is determined to destroy. Conservatives need your help! **[Will you chip in $5 today to help us stand up to Biden’s radical agenda?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8c7aadf69d9da1f0/e601a027bf0d4e61c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** I can’t do this without you. Thank you, Kevin Hern [**Donate Now!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8c7aadf69d9da1f0/0c97b422a725a6f1c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8c7aadf69d9da1f0/00547fb34fa99068c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8c7aadf69d9da1f0/152831a40f005ec7c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

clean_body: Peter, When I asked for submissions of energy hypocrites for my “Friend of Fossil Fuels” award, you delivered. Over the last month, I’ve received an overwhelming amount of submissions. You’ve sent in celebrities, politicians, woke companies, even your neighbors! But one name has popped up more than anyone else: John Kerry. John Kerry is exactly the kind of climate hypocrite that angers Americans, and he embodies everything I had in mind when I created the “Friend of Fossil Fuels” award. Kerry stands on his bully pulpit to preach clean energy and shames hard-working Americans for living our lives and utilizing the affordable and reliable energy sources that we have at our disposal. Meanwhile, he’s living a life of luxury – flying in private jets, driving around in gas-guzzling Suburbans, and powering his many mansions with a carbon footprint larger than many small countries. As Biden’s Climate Envoy, Kerry demonizes traditional energy sources, like fossil fuel. But did you know that fossil fuel is one of the cleanest sources of reliable energy? Just last week, I brought 17 Members of Congress home to Tulsa, where we met with leading executives from Oklahoma’s energy sector and learned about our state’s successful all-of-the-above approach to energy. Our grid is powered by a combination of coal, hydro, natural gas, solar, and more. This creates a clean and reliable – and most importantly, affordable – energy system for Oklahoma families and businesses. Oklahoma is the number 2 state in clean energy production! We know a thing or two about energy, which is why I’m extending an open invitation to John Kerry to come here and learn how our system works. I’m glad to give John Kerry the credit he deserves as our nation’s leading climate hypocrite. Thank you for your submissions – I’m going to make this an annual award, so keep in mind who you want to see named next year’s “Friend of Fossil Fuels”. In the meantime, I’m working hard in Congress to promote all-of-the-above energy policies and protect the high-paying energy jobs Biden is determined to destroy. Conservatives need your help! I can’t do this without you. Thank you, Kevin Hern | | | ---|--- id:2021-03-16-15:27:58:472t Paid For By Hern For Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: This is What Happens When Thugs Riot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Rioters are Scared |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b8ec303efa&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6d2d6e7ba3&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by hard leftist Darren Soto. **

I almost won this district in 2020, beating the Dem incumbent - and because of my hard work and President Trump's leadership, this district has been moved to a toss-up.

Florida is showing the country how to govern. Thank God for Gov. DeSantis! He's convincing even the Dem areas to change their minds.

One thing you don't see in Florida: RIOTS.

As Antifa and BLM devastate city after city, and Democrat mayors and governors do nothing, Florida's cities remain riot-free.

Governor DeSantis just made sure it stays that way.

_Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis signed into law on Monday a sweeping bill that he says will increase punishment for people who violently riot, loot and destroy property, and punish cities that don’t protect lives and property and attempt to redirect funding for law enforcement.

Among many things, the “Combating Public Disorder” law:

-Allows the state to circumvent local authority and punish municipalities that attempt to reduce or eliminate funding for law enforcement

-Allow businesses damaged or destroyed in lootings or riots to sue municipalities that don’t provide law enforcement protection

-Increases legal charges for people who assault anyone, particularly law enforcement, or damage property during a riot

-Revises the prohibition on obstructing traffic by standing on the street

-Prohibits protesters from using or threatening to use imminent force against another person

-Requires a person arrested for rioting to be held in custody until their first appearance in court

-And prohibits defacing, injuring or damaging a memorial or historic property, including flags

“It is the strongest anti-rioting, pro-law enforcement piece of legislation in the country and there’s just nothing even close,” DeSantis said at a Monday morning press conference before signing the bill. “If you riot, if you loot, if you harm others, particularly if you harm a law enforcement officer, during one of these violent assemblies, you’re going to jail."_

This is what leadership looks like. You step up, you defend our people, you keep the peace and save the innocent. THAT is the role of government.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=147efafec2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| The crazy Democrats in Congress love rioters. If it was up to them, every small business would be attacked by woke, left-wing protesters. _This is crazy stuff, but they are hell-bent on weaponizing the Federal government against its own citizens._

**Until the Democrats prove they accept the Constitution and protect the lives and property of innocent people, they can never be trusted with the majority in Congress again.**

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. This seat is winnable, and I am the man to do it!

I am an America First patriot, I am a Christian, and I will vote with the Constitution. I will vote against riots, to protect the American people against Woke Tyranny!

If you value peace and freedom, I need your help. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8de145b5cc&e=afa21b7626)

[Can I count on you for a donation to help me overcome the radical Left with America First patriots?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5341b07e7f&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we need control of Congress. [Help me evict Pelosi - we can do this together!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a5b1c93c&e=afa21b7626)

**_Let's get this done!_**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d40a299c57&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e92c7d45e2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1cc0158a7c&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

Here are the main components of the plan:
* Assistance for families struggling to afford child care
* Two years of free community college
* Enhancing Pell Grants
* 12 weeks of guaranteed paid parental and family leave
* A $200 billion investment in universal preschool
* Scholarships to recruit and train more teachers
* Nutrition assistance for children
* Extending or making permanent many of the tax credits passed during the pandemic

The American Families Plan, along with the nearly $2 trillion infrastructure plan President Biden already laid out, is exactly what he said he would do on the campaign trail. We agree that these investments in our future will pay enormous dividends and will put America back on track. | Patriot,
The Supreme Court will hear a case on whether ordinary citizens can be prohibited from carrying concealed handguns outside their homes.
The New York State Pistol and Rifle Association are challenging a New York law that makes it incredibly difficult to obtain a concealed carry permit.

| In what appears to be a clear violation of New Yorkers' 2nd Amendment rights, the Supreme Court will hear this case and provide a path forward. As there are 7 other hyper-liberal states that make it burdensome for their citizens to obtain concealed carry permits, this is a great opportunity to reinforce and fortify our 2nd Amendment rights.
Kat is a proud gun carrier and supporter. She stands with the New York State Pistol and Rifle Association and hopes to see this challenge protect our 2nd Amendment rights. [Can Kat count on your support to protect our right to bear arms?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WYKj7SNn_o86-HWWvjGVpkbTP0SM-58vB2pnqYq7BhgmKw0RxG2pXY1NZx6Epuz4VljHYVr-_nnroXu6lHj6FYclLhCRmqx70UFJurI2TToEM6N5t_0gMS0cfI7Pwy1gTFIKzVRMNGkg6qsIPJORJf2r3XHnM0eFpTEYG5i_9ihHWL8__95OfaphlUETYymQ&c=Ksf4wGZSIHi34Uuk4XYmd_60mJde415m8B0_PA8r-bcM1Dj9hdtP9g==&ch=3IqHXIiIqa5uGNCL1Rg_WA2BRiSp0ZPShLA2zOdeKQAj-4OC0YCksg==&jrc=1)
