clean_body: We must protect our right to bear arms | | | | | | | Patriot, The Supreme Court will hear a case on whether ordinary citizens can be prohibited from carrying concealed handguns outside their homes. The New York State Pistol and Rifle Association are challenging a New York law that makes it incredibly difficult to obtain a concealed carry permit. | | | | | In what appears to be a clear violation of New Yorkers' 2nd Amendment rights, the Supreme Court will hear this case and provide a path forward. As there are 7 other hyper-liberal states that make it burdensome for their citizens to obtain concealed carry permits, this is a great opportunity to reinforce and fortify our 2nd Amendment rights. Kat is a proud gun carrier and supporter. She stands with the New York State Pistol and Rifle Association and hopes to see this challenge protect our 2nd Amendment rights. | | | | We must stand strong now before liberals start coming after our guns! For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Josh Hawley
subject: fighting to win the culture war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
We can change the culture, but it takes action. Will you join me? [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a686c2b415594868bb5d44dc85a77213&_e=Zb0s5blkIhVYY1ThoAdHIKWs3sghqGw8YKHf7HU9RrxWddRxW4WSe3TbbQC5ycWz3llOzerhJJM4FJpFIvhmjEorSZH9ofhXIRO-eF06Zv2b7DcRcQm2M20aMBcue1qPTi_GZkfIbo2ASMczP4cURt3tEQt2-ZFtvKExNfnIay2iQ74SrkUwuTJEj_xWmovoldEUuSKAb97Vg2e6RGc4n7ShMIGqhoKROQbyLjQ9acq2cUpALvoqQxKJcH-WXzUZ06oigPw1u4g3KW8O_iOOv0fZ5YXQDLlUAwe0rnv5zrKF9m-FpsksXvc7CBgZ16T7gm9ejLXmev8QFdmjab-6lNFDuyIXzFjh2Rhrcp2Mq8_eVA-C2DVUWOe4rE5GJYG4bGZTDHVQy7fCBuko3DW2SQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
American families are on the frontlines of a culture war.

The left is working to undermine the traditional family through a whole host of social issues.

We should do the opposite, which is why I’m introducing legislation that helps working parents and is pro-family and pro-work.

Raising a family has a host of challenges, and all too often our own government makes it harder. **Well, I want to change that.**

[_**JOIN THE FIGHT**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a686c2b415594868bb5d44dc85a77213&_e=Zb0s5blkIhVYY1ThoAdHIKWs3sghqGw8YKHf7HU9RrxWddRxW4WSe3TbbQC5ycWz-kukscCeLeJoe0QHL-mKuiSNCuTx4bCWm5zOxLkuGmsXBu-X2QaxXHcS8yo8ceOgPSnKnYY5TUhj4EHTipeNGiAlXYhhk_3GLrGCTLw9fwS9OK11jEbtKR7H1ScE4q8lsBVN9yh1CVzVt0UFnq6bNA-rZH0vGP7_FKYGxEpUUmZLgLIsA6cDQUkiuRiD9jxnGCIv2p7hWIx9yleJwOrHkk-U2pV5XfD9D8pc8wbkKPuClxGWijFUmX89LKbnG8eFiNnjb9xI6FQTF1lrhnCYT1lbFJGkZak2u6NgTGp98nSmQS3ohhssT5sO0PF3HdizYbJQp-kO55JBTYtxIvonlA%3D%3D)
I’m proposing a tax break of $12,000 per married couple who are raising children under the age of 13.

**We can help strengthen the culture by building stronger families and rewarding married couples who raise a family together. **
[_**SUPPORT TEAM HAWLEY**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a686c2b415594868bb5d44dc85a77213&_e=Zb0s5blkIhVYY1ThoAdHIKWs3sghqGw8YKHf7HU9RrxWddRxW4WSe3TbbQC5ycWz-kukscCeLeJoe0QHL-mKuiSNCuTx4bCWm5zOxLkuGmsXBu-X2QaxXHcS8yo8ceOgPSnKnYY5TUhj4EHTipeNGiAlXYhhk_3GLrGCTLw9fwS9OK11jEbtKR7H1ScE4q8lWoU9760vJShXmkLZHaccw8dMvMMXbBmDmWFftHUIX9WkzwkSqjpI63Vu-nFuiETNLbIisyjwYY5aviP1p0uA1lNjkTTngwTO7Ugn5pnOYaOLqHSFuGh3Wp2ruEnBsDpVDr7a1EfcTaUwS3SCgx9sXWuv2DViVoUffYTYGwKi_XI_Xjrg_BA-e_4XEocKIawn29ZLCg5KNGj44o4m4m2Mig%3D%3D)
**We can change the culture, but it takes action. Will you join me?**
Sincerely,
Josh Hawley

body:
If Americans like you continue to sit on the sidelines, we lose.

****
****
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wSPrvxC85HXtkBmrMBaKut2WR3ewq5dF2Re7ZfLvTZwvz9j6vf3vdw4xRpOyzOyy9i15xVaBSgqXOFDqn_LdOnK1-J1WX1IZRw3GUxWeQjomQ5oapXflnnJjPk92TXKqp3c6P_vSYU6k6NWLM3dedZHb0kuCclvA1fuk_G92STzx_1S6tZfmvtFsOACTN6t0YWhoGqvFYHqIWx8DnXKBYzd_cvOBuKFqrMN-pM3He4l8vcMlZzQNcL0yHnn62-K24eAGdO0mB-LnepGyWU47pTHDYhqzSfDm8CYbYCiTErDWq8uBtYtk0Zc-GeJlfYicfjp1Dwap-C5yQLGkn8snfx-cirBkpdzfAmezGsdebEK5EuaBGu705Xl2Ch5e7FuGVM69xYy7q-LyqlZJdzT0gprzFCs6iuEYUg3_z-XFa1xP8a2b7DfnpDt6wjzdgMl27gXaiCW7mk8=&c=fydfA3M96ddeUrnAUlDjFMXzllUvGPt3WdXlpmfhAfwlzKcmZTvGkQ==&ch=nkOo50D4AmBLOyu17mBBv8uA92jYmhSgPUBvPXPJdjYfRfdld_9FJA==)
Fellow Conservative, it's Nikki Haley. The NRCC has been making its way down the list of top GOP patriots, and I am surprised to hear that you have been marked as **inactive**. We need you!

We can't give up. The Left is spending millions on attack ads, trying to turn their dreams of Socialism into reality, and attempting to ruin President Trump's policies that put America First.

I know firsthand the impact of an America First agenda. As the UN Ambassador during the Trump Administration, I worked side by side with the President to strengthen our borders, promote America's interests at home and abroad, and defend us from foreign enemies -- and now, the Left is trying to put America LAST.

They aren't going to stop until they've undone all of our hard work. [**Can I count on you to help me stop them?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wSPrvxC85HXtkBmrMBaKut2WR3ewq5dF2Re7ZfLvTZwvz9j6vf3vdw4xRpOyzOyy9i15xVaBSgqXOFDqn_LdOnK1-J1WX1IZRw3GUxWeQjomQ5oapXflnnJjPk92TXKqp3c6P_vSYU6k6NWLM3dedZHb0kuCclvA1fuk_G92STzx_1S6tZfmvtFsOACTN6t0YWhoGqvFYHqIWx8DnXKBYzd_cvOBuKFqrMN-pM3He4l8vcMlZzQNcL0yHnn62-K24eAGdO0mB-LnepGyWU47pTHDYhqzSfDm8CYbYCiTErDWq8uBtYtk0Zc-GeJlfYicfjp1Dwap-C5yQLGkn8snfx-cirBkpdzfAmezGsdebEK5EuaBGu705Xl2Ch5e7FuGVM69xYy7q-LyqlZJdzT0gprzFCs6iuEYUg3_z-XFa1xP8a2b7DfnpDt6wjzdgMl27gXaiCW7mk8=&c=fydfA3M96ddeUrnAUlDjFMXzllUvGPt3WdXlpmfhAfwlzKcmZTvGkQ==&ch=nkOo50D4AmBLOyu17mBBv8uA92jYmhSgPUBvPXPJdjYfRfdld_9FJA==)

[**HELP SAVE OUR COUNTRY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wSPrvxC85HXtkBmrMBaKut2WR3ewq5dF2Re7ZfLvTZwvz9j6vf3vdw4xRpOyzOyy9i15xVaBSgqXOFDqn_LdOnK1-J1WX1IZRw3GUxWeQjomQ5oapXflnnJjPk92TXKqp3c6P_vSYU6k6NWLM3dedZHb0kuCclvA1fuk_G92STzx_1S6tZfmvtFsOACTN6t0YWhoGqvFYHqIWx8DnXKBYzd_cvOBuKFqrMN-pM3He4l8vcMlZzQNcL0yHnn62-K24eAGdO0mB-LnepGyWU47pTHDYhqzSfDm8CYbYCiTErDWq8uBtYtk0Zc-GeJlfYicfjp1Dwap-C5yQLGkn8snfx-cirBkpdzfAmezGsdebEK5EuaBGu705Xl2Ch5e7FuGVM69xYy7q-LyqlZJdzT0gprzFCs6iuEYUg3_z-XFa1xP8a2b7DfnpDt6wjzdgMl27gXaiCW7mk8=&c=fydfA3M96ddeUrnAUlDjFMXzllUvGPt3WdXlpmfhAfwlzKcmZTvGkQ==&ch=nkOo50D4AmBLOyu17mBBv8uA92jYmhSgPUBvPXPJdjYfRfdld_9FJA==)

People like Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and AOC are obsessed with destroying policies that put America first. As a top supporter, I'm sure you agree that they need to be held accountable. **And when we 're only five seats away from flipping the House and firing Nancy Pelosi, we can't afford to have any of our top patriots give up.**

We might lose a House seat to the Democrats.

****

There's a lot on the line right now.

We lost the House Majority we had under President Trump, and we've fallen behind on what we need to win it back from Nancy Pelosi.

We need to win every seat in upcoming special elections, especially the one in Texas this weekend. The good news is that the Democrats are on the defense right now because their House Majority is hanging on by a thread. The bad news is that our special election victory fund is **_dangerously_** underfunded right now, and _**we might lose a House seat to the Democrats. **_

The radical Left is spending MILLIONS on attack ads targeting these conservative patriots running in special elections. clean_body: We might lose a House seat to the Democrats. ** There's a lot on the line right now. We lost the House Majority we had under President Trump, and we've fallen behind on what we need to win it back from Nancy Pelosi. We need to win every seat in upcoming special elections, especially the one in Texas this weekend. The good news is that the Democrats are on the defense right now because their House Majority is hanging on by a thread. The bad news is that our special election victory fund is dangerously underfunded right now, and we might lose a House seat to the Democrats. The radical Left is spending MILLIONS on attack ads targeting these conservative patriots running in special elections. They're doing whatever they can so they can maintain their majority in the House to RUIN Trump's legacy, push forward their Socialist agenda, defund the police, and put America LAST. That's why we are reaching out to you -- because we know you haven't let Trump down yet. == 6X Matching Activated for Fellow Conservative == == == == == ******** We only have three days to ensure another GOP victory in Texas. The difference begins with you, Fellow Conservative. If we win every special election coming up, we have a chance to FIRE Nancy Pelosi, elect conservative patriots who will work to save Trump's legacy in the House, and even get President Trump to run again in 2024. Does that sound like something that interests you? == The chances of flipping the House back to GOP control are slipping away with every passing hour. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Joe Biden Wants You Silent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Democrats in Congress are stupefied by a Conservative woman who does the job she was elected to do.
---
Democrats in Congress are stupefied by a Conservative woman who does the job she was elected to do.
| | | [](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/WUq8Iur0kSkTf_xs0-AX9kCus9x0rwxxEjnP9uC5FlX-VR0WzGpDknbKBUrD6tWZtv3nSMS9g8SHX0PfNZSMofwqpqve1RGxG9XKcNYOJhGN1JX5TD_KGN17ekFjqdTqUOgCOH7UsDbDLcjCQbyinMiisVIwcYRFVeItvA5T70aOoKOBadOZ_nA2U2otLiiGOhL_a4cKdH5OW0yhFbb6Nw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Greene for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/cOP0wSxPrKduyJ_lRpQo6Sk7bniHxJIp7e8s7aiE9O_-gHl0rgpPMk4Kdw7fk71W8fE8_9c4NkeaswNSQ5Yik8C3gGUBX0kqhn5YCYdTDvv1TTxlFT0fdrmDbfTQUAtFpRtxvPZwCPcywZMDpA-v5S2617m0I3eQtMSehpTqBzKVLeR-baKhwYa30-BkxIhmm7UxqAf4DRTkqYIGmeFqUA)**.
---
---
| [](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/4sRZ2JFKZ-5GERKrMR8DzvwAY9LND3DXd4ww-oE42uolv_Ft6tH9nwmfTtyxZI0g6ELMmTZguBTNS_8gXdHcJiGMlLAzCmBbqZOyl7vrL9RjEZAlwS5AhA8PcWMvMZKBmgTlqIhczmPDLhV2oOwOWoqQ7bRo4JFlDyixgdgOKL0XfnvpjSXhxCoF8ITj1MRKWhMtNyanjWFI8TYwvggdIA "Tweet") Fellow Patriot: Democrats in Congress are stupefied by a Conservative woman who does the job she was elected to do. I’m Marjorie Taylor Greene, and every time I refuse to sit down and do as I am told, they have to take Joe Biden to a fainting couch. **_First_** , they called me crazy and laughed at everyone who voted for me. **_Then_** , they tried to take me off any committee because I refused to play their games. **In their third act** , 73 Members of Congress tried to expel me from Congress. **_Now_** , they are fundamentally changing the rules of Congress because I believe that the American people deserve full transparency in the House of Representatives. Nancy Pelosi disagrees – if you are standing with her, you can stop reading and go back to your yoga and soymilk retreat. **[If you are standing with the people, then I need to know that you have my back.](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/rbN3yeuwNAqgqxj3KXP9NpBhjwrQ7jdjGFNlRhn_0koF_wz40hHL2O172PjQBZMB-tA1EUZH19ZiP-BnClPY1CCj8brw6qbojajCRxuF_JpOoGJwkrSTZ0vhLz-UR6R4qg4X4i1wcXARAhtv2Z9jaaoxhFlowa9Y7krOW2gg9FJoOJNgioJU6N17RiOUlOSI0i8PI7CjwmCoswNMARIbKg "If you are standing with the people, then I need to know that you have my back.")** Joe Biden campaigned on transparency in government, but I am not surprised that he threw it out the window as soon as he got into office. Biden is even delivering a speech to Congress that will be missing most of Congress! He scheduled the speech for a time when most of us will be working in our own districts – and then the Democrat leadership announces that I couldn’t come even if I wanted to because of COVID! This is ridiculous! **[If you believe that the House of Representatives belongs to the people, not the elites, I need you to help fund my campaign to make sure I have what I need to keep fighting.](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/-VyBxS4GtdgO4rjbolmMYeX6xKgFqlxwpUy8sINfw6tTQSVXW9iLbpbv72PZl_TiINAZLmQ6J8_L_32v3cJ6h62TfKfyChNncKV_qbgOx1ET08Hu3z1FJpubs2e83oEcPz-9K_MUGewhRI47TAL5r-uQoDC4kjIYVwmm6ZKzbldIhV2p6kveooNkqTUNlsOcdCJYaLhJYXNCHWoks7-7Zg "If you believe that the House of Representatives belongs to the people, not the elites, I need you to help fund my campaign to make sure I have what I need to keep fighting.")** Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are counting on you to shrug your shoulders and stop caring. **I’m just not built like that -_I still believe America is worth fighting for._** **[I need to know if you feel the same.](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/VkdVf41-HI64AYajFNUvXKhO9-350ePJkPwxgdTRl2dmBd-7BA5MqcC1F6Pwq7U6ktzEVsY3n4LGU1xIoE-hHSg5Z__Ggy5KI6KJVlVJ_I05mSqzdlrR1qXCOAwMJMCCAI8wnXOcfifdf2WXqoMCGivJeyM_4ARmIspRJwm0MRyEjAPnQh3k7z7iLG41-lH_HCFuDyCtCRst0Oe1UhUPdQ "I need to know if you feel the same.")** God Bless America,
[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/XiEa9MV6Ae545cChL1Kaf9V6-Jh2InXZQpwAp_NmcDD3bECqUA51sC347RphD3ful9XXcBozVzYJKsh3JA_Ii3rsse8-7YdaspuFd6N5lr3io_Io2HLJn61aM58aGhStg5ZjJD39GxhK_HgA_PSvNNcY8tIn8fPyZA_TmYrnFLEwbbIO0S2pAold4G-sJ67SS0TYsklN72gLiMQS1etNzg "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. This is how tyranny starts – by silencing the people. **[If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/0M6TaJ2xqO9n3Q9o6pcweRjhroc4IslxkIJTIA-LGe9H6UoLpYMaNrVdoGMLWQRFcHE1wWsTIVbibInSXh2c1AZ3PsDA-mVIjg3O4QyR6gQXIgTASO3UVQhxPZl1c9Rp3GVHiVZm6pHYx7VGZNt9DVNqNkxAnA1VNr2zMJwTSFdT7y3Rdi44ClknLnjsVIW2I7orvp98Ao8f9j0gIl2BM_QtkpCYcxc5ACf3GOVZUSE "If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** | | [STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/ITgnsYgJ2WiwsxWI___kYeFiS8JQ6-Y5-3ANRYNEh6fYPl9OgL_Bpm8LQY6acg6uxEppOelaKZ3v-DxBVcMeA92WvC1-HXjb33EpgjXt7k4lbY3WMvbSAkHHnlhLQEbO-TO1yCmOlfbSQ-jZzzgjcuhv3h-qiDrXkXWLHZsm6APmO2HxVdtApEN5B1iAy9S66BxE4jhp5VTH45WITdaFmQ "STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER")

Friend,

Joe Biden does not believe in the promise of America, and nothing he says tonight can change that. That’s why I am about to give a speech to the nation and set the record straight.

As Americans, we cannot give into Cancel Culture or the factually baseless beliefs of the Radical Left. We must stand together in support of the American Dream.

Make no mistake; if Patriotic Americans, like yourself, sit on the sidelines, Joe Biden will be able to replace the American Dream with a socialist nightmare.

I believe that a strong Republican Party is the best chance we have to save our country from going down a path towards socialism. Can I count on you to step up?

clean_body: We just got allotted a second congressional seat here in Montana! This is huge news because Montana now has twice the representation in Washington tha | | | Folks, We just got allotted a second congressional seat here in Montana! This is huge news because Montana now has twice the representation in Washington than it did before. We’ve truly been on the rise as a state, and I am proud of the contributions that we’ve seen from Helena. Did you know we are the 6th largest city in the state and are growing at 1.68% annually? We bring a lot to the table for our state, and I am proud to be a part of the leadership team making it happen. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | I can’t wait to see what the future holds for our city, Wilmot Collins Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

name: Governor Reynolds
subject: I won’t let Washington, D.C. walk over Iowa, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Kim Reynolds for Iowa Committee

I have joined forces with 12 other Republican states to fight back against Joe Biden's tax hikes that he is using to BAIL OUT blue states.

's radical blue state bailout tax hike >>> HERE**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011R1NNTixysoXG2_bGSDzSal3AZGlbaVfOiqnetYctFIITjoixn5EYsBYuoYVfAUd1wiG4aPf1jye24nGhTkLzj4uG7CTPzMXCIYxQaoZDSY8ENsq5rEFLzo_b1tu_hIUfYCXkss-MD40WBzi8HQOXVnRdA8aXSL5YYGbLjizbhlTOc-e60IKBByHOjCwcoStCd_WjE4SlC9NGsgoiMTfaEWSG_8iMTYE-m8kq8LbtcXlOoFLMBbxYZq0PyFB8QhXYzfLnAMq7H52D6SEp1aGOsbABUKDdF1dPjCimpmJuLR8DMlyhG0v14jYmYlGvBYyYXfQqXwECr0HxeaMnahIGS9-otasBPYfhFH1gePDQtrn8xRf7m9B9qc6DErULzARMA4K2ZYh31NISHOVxGWpHTKALq043Kr9hWZCt2Mg-UzHYMwqQ77NxrRXwpBaVcqYTtmBYviThdXe5xqhT_zBvCIC6WOmZrvLlszS7-1WLpY=&c=jLdgVNFOlvh_o2qisxz9y7WaOf92YBr34UE3mUe9D-rp508UxtOqNw==&ch=CqAV28Hyz4muk4JXbNbK5cnUTFC5XfZucovp0SyQ-MKYOv6baWgeHw==)
Whether it be putting our kids back in the classroom, being the #1 state in opportunity, or having one of the lowest unemployment rates in the nation, it is no secret that Iowa is leading by example. Democrats in D.C. want to stunt the growth that Iowa has made recently by forcing us to pay to bail out blue states like New York, California, and Illinois.

Even worse, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are refusing to lead and take any effective action at our southern border, forcing states to help deal with this crisis! But I will continue to fight back against their radical policies and lack of leadership that is failing so many Americans.
_I refuse to let Washington, D.C. walk over us Friend._
It is time to fight back against the radical left, tell Joe Biden that we will NOT bail out blue states and keep our state moving in the right direction. **We can 't do all of this without you, Friend!**

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9495348/224717773/188340/14/).

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: Indiana’s 9th straight balanced budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We’ve weathered the economic storm of COVID-19 and we’re firing on all cylinders once again –– beating expectations at every turn. [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d891ce03ff464e7fb106c7a9aa000f32&_e=QHn22taiDvQ4mIu0csTfkt32DC5y7UHTTzajgkHG_GjW3SWO94wPJjz0ehkatvw43nsCMe-CIuAq45KlwBCz-gXIBaEhc4U59hPTRSmal_3oHE1k6at-XH2Z782A45GXMmiJ0rjFPv1XoIKECbjQWjGecj-az-V8Ci2juAoQyQ7uVojLcCQs1YdV0HxuYpwzrR2wQNFaLCVbils8ZIST_-R3LP8ZKItUDsnzutD2jjvWFMBm6oZHM0w_DTCoQSf8cKmJswooF22Me4ZySRHIW8h7bnxsi2cH_0NwME19topMEXQ13_NDO_iqCnzN2WNbM5YtUU12QWcpA2jG4nTABbE4K41usnbpQ_a-sIwTp4zeTvpGbjSwG7BTY-L5XRqdpYP2kBmgHK0aPOC8Xxv-1AelbzU_CjdCjrU8CjH5X7t4AIat3UWnmxxUeG834fypp0zgFfDswCGesAT-yDLbQwBlhJ9eFFmfkw7xc8tWpfI%3D) | |
---
|
---
Friend,

Last week our state legislative session went into recess and I want to let you know how excited I am for Indiana’s next chapter.

This past year was one of the most challenging years we’ve ever faced. But I can say with full confidence that Indiana’s future is bright –– and the balanced, historic, bipartisan budget we just passed makes our future **even brighter.**

While other states are tightening their belts and cutting budgets, we’re investing in communities, students, teachers, law enforcement, and Hoosiers like never before. It’s incredible, and it’s all happening for one simple reason:

**Responsible, conservative fiscal management.**

Because of the Hoosier Spirit that drives us, we’ve weathered the economic storm of COVID-19 and we’re firing on all cylinders once again –– beating expectations at every turn.

Below, I’ll break down the impacts that this balanced budget will have on education, economic development, and my Next Level Agenda. _**[Don’t forget to take the survey at the end to let me know what you’re most excited about!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d891ce03ff464e7fb106c7a9aa000f32&_e=QHn22taiDvQ4mIu0csTfkt32DC5y7UHTTzajgkHG_GjW3SWO94wPJjz0ehkatvw43nsCMe-CIuAq45KlwBCz-gXIBaEhc4U59hPTRSmal_3oHE1k6at-XH2Z782A45GXMmiJ0rjFPv1XoIKECbjQWjGecj-az-V8Ci2juAoQyQ7uVojLcCQs1YdV0HxuYpwzrR2wQNFaLCVbils8ZIST_-R3LP8ZKItUDsnzutD2jjvWFMBm6oZHM0w_DTCoQSf8cKmJswooF22Me4ZySRHIW1tbfrNsum5o_O4W905YT0jET4JpOZ7V-RcjDIANpJ9t__cF64t7gMYzos2nJ4AUvusjHEJNjM0_F3Rvi63sI8I2V_fB82T7LwvbQLCIIJlsShZwJPYCfbwoU1vmmV0w4llY9wBuiDxY8zGaOke7P16yUl2RrMpDNV0ynPfws43q-rIWCliD_3ysLVi7AuzrhwlGMIc_X6XIakCJz4QY_VA%3D)**_

_****ED** UCATION**_

Unprecedented investments in Hoosier education are on the horizon with more than 50% of the budget’s general fund dedicated to K-12 education, which allows us to:
* Invest $1.9 billion in NEW money for K-12 education.
* Invest $1.03 billion in NEW money for K-12 tuition support.
* Expand the nation’s best school choice program.
* Increase teacher compensation

_**ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT**_

Indiana’s workforce saw a **record number of job commitments** last year despite the uncertainty of the pandemic. Under this budget, we’re working to break that record again by:
* Investing an additional $60 million in small business relief.
* Investing $500 million in the new Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative to spur regional cooperation.
* Investing $10 million to help Hoosier manufacturers invest in new equipment and technologies.

_**MORE NEXT LEVEL AGENDA WINS**_

Thanks to the incredible cooperation of both parties in both houses, we were able to pass a number of transformational items from my Next Level Agenda, including:__
* COVID liability protections for schools and businesses.
* Comprehensive law enforcement reform that provides body cameras for officers and reviews training protocols.
* Expanded broadband development.
* Pregnancy accommodations for expecting mothers in the workplace.
* Keeping telehealth services permanent making life easier for Hoosier patients and healthcare providers.

Friend, what we were able to accomplish in this legislative session is nothing short of amazing –– and I applaud all who worked together to make sure that Indiana will continue moving in the right direction for years to come.

**[Before you go, will you take our quick one-minute survey to let me know what part of the budget you’re most excited about?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d891ce03ff464e7fb106c7a9aa000f32&_e=QHn22taiDvQ4mIu0csTfkt32DC5y7UHTTzajgkHG_GjW3SWO94wPJjz0ehkatvw43nsCMe-CIuAq45KlwBCz-gXIBaEhc4U59hPTRSmal_3oHE1k6at-XH2Z782A45GXMmiJ0rjFPv1XoIKECbjQWjGecj-az-V8Ci2juAoQyQ7uVojLcCQs1YdV0HxuYpwzrR2wQNFaLCVbils8ZIST_-R3LP8ZKItUDsnzutD2jjvWFMBm6oZHM0w_DTCoQSf8cKmJswooF22Me4ZySRHIW3UrjEBpOTjKmIA4VBRMkyBNau7DM8R8o8vmFIRLzKy3TGA5kjuLr2sGAh4NXeNTrdUYUgwRvbBkPJS2T_YjuUXf314uv8rYNQk_3u8TZtnSYeRjcw0HBNv9k7V1mzROrMDnhgy888n6L9elEATgdDA2JND0lzbS9GJlkyA_MwW3682BSDnP6SIrNu35hxmpM63rFXj2ch9kVd65TLNA3m4%3D)**
[**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d891ce03ff464e7fb106c7a9aa000f32&_e=QHn22taiDvQ4mIu0csTfkt32DC5y7UHTTzajgkHG_GjW3SWO94wPJjz0ehkatvw43nsCMe-CIuAq45KlwBCz-gXIBaEhc4U59hPTRSmal_3oHE1k6at-XH2Z782A45GXMmiJ0rjFPv1XoIKECbjQWjGecj-az-V8Ci2juAoQyQ7uVojLcCQs1YdV0HxuYpwzrR2wQNFaLCVbils8ZIST_-R3LP8ZKItUDsnzutD2jjvWFMBm6oZHM0w_DTCoQSf8cKmJswooF22Me4ZySRHIW8FQiGHtQF8ibk849dvUkIqVAAHQwEaIXo5EDqUJ8ufghv6urDN_P1EwR7BbgzsYWA3HnwjALyjXalR6jHfHoW1mGndAs46wiiUf_i_tA2W0rq9u38wRGeqpqCFxYPU-id0ofCivQU4IU_2PgpE2qODeUJiT5s9sf18odHWkJHfIIHKekP1eQc2auI_ln3gpE7cCZ_FIZf9hG1bwLB-g5T0%3D)
Thank you,
Eric Holcomb

Friend,

I have some news. I finally have an opponent, and she was hand-picked by Democratic Socialist Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez herself!

She’s a member of the Democratic Socialists of America’s Staten Island chapter, but the BAD NEWS is that she raised over $120k during the first quarter.** We’ve got to make a statement. That’s why we have to CRUSH our End of Month goal** and show them that Socialism is not welcome in Staten Island or the United States of America.

**This is what the Democrat Socialists want: the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, Defunding the Police, Critical Race Theory in our Schools, equity and not equality.**

name: John Burke
subject: Save our California restaurants!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Kevin Faulconer has a plan to save our California restaurants. Will you help? Read more >>
Peter, California’s restaurant industry has been _decimated_ by the COVID-19 pandemic lockdowns. At points during the pandemic, our state led the nation in number of restaurants closed, and now tens of thousands of establishments have closed their doors for good.

**Kevin Faulconer recently teamed up with Chef Andrew Gruel of Slapfish, to draw attention to the issue. He said, “Jobs are gone, dreams have been crushed, and our communities where many of these restaurants have been institutions, are left emptier as a result.”** Not only that, but thanks to Gavin Newsom’s draconian lockdown logic, the restaurants that are managing to survive are facing confusing and contradictory restrictions that are NOT based on science! **[Please watch and share a short news clip of Kevin and Andrew’s news conference, and hear about their plan to SAVE the California restaurant industry.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/274e1fc034aa9453/8a42feb8f2f9dcc3c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/274e1fc034aa9453/410bf1cccb274340c3d6b838967d376c/34943) There _are_ real world, workable solutions that will allow restaurants to safely operate and serve our communities.
From Michelin Star restaurants to mom-and-pop local favorites, California has long been home to some of the best eateries in the world. We’re now in serious danger of losing this vital industry in our state.
We have to allow our restaurants to stay open, to feed our communities, and to provide jobs for hardworking men and women trying to pay their bills.
**Please help spread the word that there is a commonsense candidate for Governor who understands the vital importance of helping our restaurants recover and thrive in California!**
Thanks for your help,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/274e1fc034aa9453/8daba3a4b08c7d64c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/274e1fc034aa9453/8f6b54c8cceed6c1c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/274e1fc034aa9453/f1cb3c376d00517cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/274e1fc034aa9453/75272a88e76973b7c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Erica Smith
subject: SAY HIS NAME: Andrew Brown Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Content warning: This email discusses police brutality and murder
#
_Content warning: This email discusses police brutality and murder_
**Andrew Brown was executed by the police in Elizabeth City, North Carolina.**
With his hands on the steering wheel, he was shot five times. Four in the arm and a fifth time, fatally, in the back of the head.
These past two days I’ve been in Elizabeth City, standing in solidarity with the family and demanding transparency, accountability, and justice.
The bodycam footage was withheld for days. When it was finally released, it was shown just to the family and one of their attorneys, and it was a mere twenty seconds from a single body cam.
Twenty seconds is not transparency, especially not considering that seven officers have been placed on “administrative leave” and three more have stepped down.
**I’m calling on the district attorney to hand over this case to Attorney General Josh Stein and his office and I’m calling for the release of all the footage to the public.**
The trial for the murder of George Floyd was interrupted by a Black Army Lieutenant being pulled over and pepper-sprayed in Virginia, which was interrupted by the murder of Daunte Wright, which was interrupted by the killing of Ma’Khia Bryant, which was followed by the execution of Andrew Brown. This is America.
**And this is why** **we need the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. We need to reimagine public safety and law enforcement. We need reparations. Our survival is dependent on these changes, but it still feels insufficient.**
What does restorative justice look like for Andrew Brown’s family? What does restorative justice look like for George Floyd’s daughter, for Daunte Wright’s son?
To be Black in America should not be a condemnation to a life of trauma.
To be Black in America should not be to so intimately feel the oppression inflicted on generations past and present.
To be Black in America should not be to wake up every day and in a different form or fashion be told that your life does not matter.
**We need transparency, we need accountability, we need justice.**
I have four sons and they look like Andrew Brown. Like Daunte Wright. Like George Floyd. I shouldn’t have to worry that an expired license could be their death sentence, that they could be shot by law enforcement while their hands are on the wheel.
Loose cigarettes, counterfeit bills, the wrong door, mistaking a taser for a gun, possession — the excuses may be different but the result, the murder of innocent and unarmed Black human beings, is always the same.
_This is not an "accident."_ That is the continuation of decades upon decades of policy that has violently targeted Black people and wrecked Black families. It is not an accident, it is a choice. It was the choice of slavery, it was the choice of Jim Crow, it was the choice of the war on drugs and it is a choice being made today.
**We will fight until a different choice is made.** Until justice rolls like a river down every street in every town and city and washes away the blood of the murdered and the ghosts of America’s colonialist and bigoted past.
**Black Lives Matter. We cannot merely speak it. We must make it so.**
In solidarity,
Erica
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210428-57-footer&t=1&refcode2=57_3698_Z0ZpHl&akid=57%2E3698%2EZ0ZpHl)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=2&akid=57%2E3698%2EZ0ZpHl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=57%2E3698%2EZ0ZpHl)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Dems Want FCC to Block Conservative Co.’s Radio Station Deal after Firing of Clinton Fundraiser
body:
Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | April 28, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53546&L=22687&F=H&)
---
# [Dems Want FCC to Block Conservative Co.’s Radio Station Deal after Firing of Clinton Fundraiser](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53546&L=22687&F=H&)
Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city. The politician turned radio host, Raul Martinez, was the Spanish-language station’s top host before a conservative media conglomerate bought it and changed the liberal-leaning programming. The deal received sparse local media coverage but earned national attention when lawmakers in Washington D.C. asked a federal agency to reject the sale for what appears to be political reasons.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53546&L=22687&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Judicial Watch: Documents Show CA State Officials Coordinated with Big Tech to Censor Americans’ Election Posts ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53546&L=22760&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI4MTkzOTE1) Judicial Watch The records were obtained in response to Judicial Watch’s California Public Records Act (CPRA) requests to the Office of the California Secretary of State for records related to the Office of Election Cybersecurity’s database of social media posts; communications with social media companies; and other social media related records regarding the 2020 elections. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53546&L=22760&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI4MTkzOTE1)

### [Top 10 Sickening Details About How Federal Employees Trafficked Baby Body Parts ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53546&L=22761&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvYmFieS1ib2R5LXBhcnRzLWZkYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQyODE5MzkxNQ==) The Federalist In what should have been a national headline, the exposure of the U.S. government’s involvement in trafficking aborted baby bodies is now even more newsworthy following Friday’s announcement from the White House. At President Biden’s direction, the Department of Health and Human Services reversed the Trump administration’s policy protecting preborn Americans from the callous dehumanization of organ harvesting and further desecration of their bodies in research disguised as “science.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53546&L=22761&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvYmFieS1ib2R5LXBhcnRzLWZkYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQyODE5MzkxNQ==)

clean_body: Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city. | | | Because no one is above the law! | April 28, 2021 ---|---|--- | | = = Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city. The politician turned radio host, Raul Martinez, was the Spanish-language station’s top host before a conservative media conglomerate bought it and changed the liberal-leaning programming. The deal received sparse local media coverage but earned national attention when lawmakers in Washington D.C. asked a federal agency to reject the sale for what appears to be political reasons. = | | | Judicial Watch The records were obtained in response to Judicial Watch’s California Public Records Act (CPRA) requests to the Office of the California Secretary of State for records related to the Office of Election Cybersecurity’s database of social media posts; communications with social media companies; and other social media related records regarding the 2020 elections. == The Federalist In what should have been a national headline, the exposure of the U.S. government’s involvement in trafficking aborted baby bodies is now even more newsworthy following Friday’s announcement from the White House. At President Biden’s direction, the Department of Health and Human Services reversed the Trump administration’s policy protecting preborn Americans from the callous dehumanization of organ harvesting and further desecration of their bodies in research disguised as “science.” == = Fox Business Judicial Watch, a government transparency watchdog group, announced Tuesday that it has obtained documents allegedly showing California officials colluding with social media giants to censor speech surrounding the 2020 elections – including some of its own posts. = == == == == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

**I’ve had the honor of working with Elaine to expand access to health care, deliver economic relief to struggling Virginians, fight the pandemic, strengthen offshore energy development, and address climate change in coastal Virginia.**

By contrast, her opponent is a GOP state senator who calls herself a “big supporter” of Donald Trump and whose _first_ policy stance upon entering the race was to oppose funding for relief checks and vaccine distribution.

We can’t afford to replace Elaine with someone like that. We need bipartisan leaders like the Congresswoman in the House. She’s always looked out for Virginians — and she always will.

Luria’s reelection campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28364966/283009539/295015382?refcode=ris_20210428_e_f_us_na_na_eomluriand__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTYxMmYxOS03YmE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFtWjECkuluQCOlOt0MW1-u25Me3o7I_J_uicpwI8AI=)**

Elaine Luria just got a new opponent in her 2022 race, so I’m reaching out to ask for your help defending my friend’s seat in the House. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Elaine Luria and Mark Warner: = = = = = = I’ve had the honor of working with Elaine to expand access to health care, deliver economic relief to struggling Virginians, fight the pandemic, strengthen offshore energy development, and address climate change in coastal Virginia. By contrast, her opponent is a GOP state senator who calls herself a “big supporter” of Donald Trump and whose first policy stance upon entering the race was to oppose funding for relief checks and vaccine distribution. We can’t afford to replace Elaine with someone like that. We need bipartisan leaders like the Congresswoman in the House. She’s always looked out for Virginians — and she always will. = Sincerely, Mark Warner P.S. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our April fundraising deadline on Friday.
Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important? Here’s the short of it:
1. Pennsylvania is the most important Senate race in the country

2. That’s because the fate of our Senate majority hangs in the balance

3. So the race is super crowded (_and competitive_) already

4. And it’s going to take a lot of hard work (_and resources_) to replace Republican Pat Toomey with a Democrat who will fight for working families next fall

[If that’s all you need to know, will you make that $3 contribution to help us build an unstoppable coalition of working folks to win this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28365185/283010001/-347207331?refcode2=105e226a-7ca8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210428&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDVlMjI2YS03Y2E4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaUZve8MYMRDZhPHMhcEiPgmtAlDMEfTKx8tFqf2nes=)
**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28365186/283010002/-347207331?refcode2=105e226a-7ca8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210428&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDVlMjI2YS03Y2E4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaUZve8MYMRDZhPHMhcEiPgmtAlDMEfTKx8tFqf2nes=)**
Our strategy to win this race, even in a competitive, crowded field of candidates is simple.
We must build a huge coalition of working people — from all 50 states and every one of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties — behind our movement for healthcare, green union jobs, climate action, voting rights, and so much more.
And supporters like you are the key to that strategy. That’s because donations from real working people like you are what fund our work.
When you chip in to our campaign, your dollars go right to work helping us build that coalition.
They pay for videos to share my story of growing up dirt poor in the North Philly projects, events to get our message out, and grassroots organizing across the Commonwealth of PA.
Now, we have a lot of that planned for May and June, but we have to hit our April fundraising goal to make it all happen.
**That’s why I’m asking for your $3 today. If you can spare a few bucks ahead of Friday’s deadline to help us build an unstoppable movement, it would mean so much.**
**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28365187/283010003/-347207331?refcode2=105e226a-7ca8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210428&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDVlMjI2YS03Y2E4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaUZve8MYMRDZhPHMhcEiPgmtAlDMEfTKx8tFqf2nes=)**
Thanks for being a part of our campaign to give working folks their own voice in Washington.
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6cc1cd1e-7aa8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/105e226a-7ca8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDVlMjI2YS03Y2E4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaUZve8MYMRDZhPHMhcEiPgmtAlDMEfTKx8tFqf2nes=&id=120380453) to unsubscribe. name: Susan Wild
subject: Your help means a lot to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I know we can win. We’ve faced these odds before. But we’re going to need every single grassroots dollar we can get in order to defend this House seat.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28365800/283015239/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210428-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzg1MjM2OS03ZmE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZBrlaZeCx6VFnxtmsJag_FW_wwBD1bQ9d2ZR3kjqSc=)

| Peter,

I hope you’ll give me a moment of your time to let me explain why I’m [_**asking you to chip in $25 to my re-election campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28365801/283015240/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210428-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzg1MjM2OS03ZmE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZBrlaZeCx6VFnxtmsJag_FW_wwBD1bQ9d2ZR3kjqSc=)

A lot happened in our campaign this past month. We learned that one of my multiple Republican opponents (yes, there’s already multiple!) kickstarted her campaign with $500,000 of her personal wealth, putting us at a disadvantage despite a good first quarter.

Then, the Cook Political Report identified PA-07 as an EVEN split between Democrats and Republicans in their 2021 analysis - rating this district as even more competitive than it was in 2020.

I know we can win. We’ve faced these odds before. But we’re going to need every single grassroots dollar we can get in order to defend this House seat.

We have a big End of Month deadline in 2 days. It’s important we show our strength early on, or Republicans will think we are vulnerable.

[_**Will you chip in $25 (or anything you can) to my re-election campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28365802/283015241/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210428-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzg1MjM2OS03ZmE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZBrlaZeCx6VFnxtmsJag_FW_wwBD1bQ9d2ZR3kjqSc=)

Your support means the world to me,

_Susan Wild_

subject: be a part of this grassroots movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
We’re halfway to our goal of $25,000 and it’s because of this grassroots movement we’re building. Peter, We have great news! We’re halfway to our goal of $25,000 and it’s because of this grassroots movement we’re building. **Don’t forget we’re sharing a list of our April donors with President Trump. Make sure you’re on the list by Friday, April 30 at 11:59PM. You just have to chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2269538/](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=a51961d6fc6d445abc43b6d25a0375c6&_e=QxbwlPZlvf5oU6vjvDYKjQX_7sR_6VIdqHoH8IQCvgxFEy6EziMorpYw0OnJwqYhYx3GG32fciFJikK4y8_Kz7OCnSnotp0ZVmK7wy2ncgeEQXjZ2aFOBLyCRpPi7Tw2VzemaaCZwyprE0ON6nDm98s0PMrk_YDin87qDFq9QMKe1Gxn2qVMHQHW5xwoCaSj_n_UfKQA7WbozXTMh_XxP1jtWyxR5PaV4Phm8eS87WfHpA8AEyuszFcI793_FraYCo0gwW_xJ8Cw_45FGAcnz-7mvP1j5bsfeKLeoQDLsqWTrcRIWfqd6XDm7ZWM6gJ_fiuythr818GGUQqHrlwBX6vAc6CCt2QeiAdBxTefkvYXU07brlVvIEPXoQPq2K2N0E41K2-_w9e-MkPU8nFdhyF7wsll4L3ANDEFqeCTlOc66ML7vLXDsPTpTx8MageBpAhi1xVHqR5Q_MQK1aprhZLw6xmSYM4Km0hrxMcFHus%3D)** Peter, I know we have a tough battle ahead but Sarah is committed to fighting for YOU. She will
* Call out the radical left in Washington for their socialist agenda
* Demand President Biden be held accountable for his border failure

Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law. State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: D.C. statehood = trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I’m not sure if you’ve seen the news.. Last week, my former opponent and our representative Susan Wild voted to make Washington D.C. our 51st STATE. Peter, I’m not sure if you’ve seen the news.. Last week, my former opponent and our representative Susan Wild voted to make Washington D.C. our 51st STATE. This is extremely concerning. If this continues on to pass in the Senate, Democrats will gain more legislative control. That’s their only goal, Peter- control. It’s unconstitutional. The Democrats aren’t passionate about D.C. becoming a state. They want more power to assert their agenda in Congress. Our nation’s capital was set to always remain a bipartisan stronghold. Washington is overwhelmingly Liberal. Can you imagine a similar fight from Democrats if Washington was Conservative? I can’t either.
**[Peter, we want to know your opinion. Do you think D.C. should become the 51st state? clean_body: I’m not sure if you’ve seen the news.. Last week, my former opponent and our representative Susan Wild voted to make Washington D.C. our 51st STATE. Peter, I’m not sure if you’ve seen the news.. Last week, my former opponent and our representative Susan Wild voted to make Washington D.C. our 51st STATE. This is extremely concerning. If this continues on to pass in the Senate, Democrats will gain more legislative control. That’s their only goal, Peter- control. It’s unconstitutional. The Democrats aren’t passionate about D.C. becoming a state. They want more power to assert their agenda in Congress. Our nation’s capital was set to always remain a bipartisan stronghold. Washington is overwhelmingly Liberal. Can you imagine a similar fight from Democrats if Washington was Conservative? I can’t either. SHOULD DC BECOME A STATE? Your opinion on this matter is crucial. As our representative Susan Wild panders to Nancy Pelosi and the demands of House Democrats, we need to stand up for common sense values here in Pennsylvania. Our nation’s capital should be protected as a bipartisan place where laws are made. Together, we can keep Washington the way our Founders and Constitution intended. Thanks, Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

Fellow Conservative,

Make no mistake - the crisis unfolding at the southern border is 100% the result of President Joe Biden’s disastrous policies - that started on day one of his presidency.

Under President Donald Trump, tremendous progress had been made to secure the border and put an end to illegal immigration, but Biden and the Democrats have thrown all of that away by halting construction of the border wall and all but inviting a new explosion of illegal immigration into the United States.

[**Sign the DEMAND!
Tell Joe Biden to FINALLY Secure the Border! -> **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=88f112bec2b84a11add33a2fbdacddf4&_e=XhtmUoz5q5XwyVsnZ2orYdlIoVyVUKA8dmxgPm8N8CFUp1WX93D7zn-HJKH7qwnaJrtA4lTS3ZfhbcGqJ7IdZJ_I7vzPkChb9XxWXM4bNxzZIAGk68-c30sNZUob2WxnwEYA3aLpB7DfvyVuIJXAWGOSjqFLaKluSI08clfiH-dABIfbc2GCcXKApJAaCFdzOkd91mIHhDrLoO2kFmycvoPUE5As4bTSEJQzt4-hMoKwtqi8Uqmx6d48r8OyzLAVZ6PI8tkFDYreXQA7uhP36NOhMvLZ6vSdX8zypU15sg8Qtpbiy220rSOtDeyI0rP7AXuqmZDx7whTl0DQMTmYarzaHKcxlvCAkZ7jCjuLeDdyLzdePT2hQGf68AGRfvo42sVnWk_XKeVhSLl5VILAtDyOkTdruWc7Ina_UOPzro6TdK1PU9RpEpKcprfBexHPB1BXB6Ohq9cwuSxDaciPkGbgZOmNnjK044YsDPc_DqqZZTwckhG2ar8tpeqHib6_je8JWtKcxbbARx_oIlK18A%3D%3D)

name: Rebecca Rodriguez
subject: Thank you for being a part of this important work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Our work depends on folks like you chipping in to keep AOC in Congress.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210428-2055-header&t=1&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ)
Hi it’s Rebecca — Alexandria’s campaign manager. I’m reaching out to explain why your first contribution to support our campaign today will make an incredible difference.
On a grassroots campaign like ours, it’s crucial that we raise enough small-dollar donations each and every month in order to hit our fundraising goals. Hitting these goals guarantees that we’ll be able to expand our organizing efforts, win in 2022, and keep up the fight for policies that match the crises we face.
In just a few days, we are up against our important April fundraising deadline, but we’re still coming up short of our target right now. **So we’ve done the math — if 2,300 people make their first donation of $5 today, we'll close the gap in our fundraising today.**
[If you’re able, can you be one of the 2,300 people we’re relying on today to make a first-time contribution, help hit our April targets, and power our grassroots campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210428-nd?refcode=em20210428-2055-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2055_2526796_cSPQRQ&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ)
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210428-nd?refcode=em20210428-2055-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2055_2526796_cSPQRQ&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ)**
Our campaign is 100% people-funded — Alexandria doesn’t accept money from corporate PACs or lobbyists, and she doesn’t spend her time calling wealthy donors to help hit our goals. Nearly all of our campaign’s fundraising comes from contributions from online ads and emails just like this one.
Thank you so much for your support, and have a great rest of your day.
Rebecca

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210428-nd?refcode=em20210428-2055-P&t=23&refcode2=2055_2526796_cSPQRQ&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2055%2E2526796%2EcSPQRQ)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: 👇 URGENT DEADLINE APPROACHING👇 Fellow Conservative, I’m calling on EVERY single patriot to step up, and take a stand with me against the Radical Left. It’s no secret they have control of the House, Senate, and White House. Here’s the issue with that → If the Democrats are able to keep the House, Senate, and White House under their control, they will use this as an opportunity to force their Socialist wishlist against us! Fellow Conservative, here are just a FEW of the terrible things that Joe Biden and the socialist left are pushing for: Defunding the police Opening our borders Kowtowing to the Chinese Communist Party This is problematic because we’re already seeing them attempt to permanently seize hold of the House, Senate and Supreme Court through making DC a state (even though that’s completely unconstitutional) and PACKING the Supreme Court to undermine the justices that President Trump placed there. Will you sit idly by as the Democrats dismantle all of our institutions one by one? Or will you stand up to them by pitching in towards our End of Month deadline before it’s too late? Don’t let this opportunity go to waste. This is the only way we can stop the Radical Left before they cause irreversible damage. ** Thank you, Jim Banks, Chairman House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. name: Mo Brooks
subject: Buckle up...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
As our country slowly recovers from the economic devastation wrought by the coronavirus and subsequent lockdowns, Biden’s about to address the nation to discuss...raising taxes?
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom&n=1)
---

| Peter, As our country slowly recovers from the economic devastation wrought by the coronavirus and subsequent lockdowns, Biden’s about to address the nation to discuss...**_raising taxes?_** **Seriously?!?** Rather than trimming the fat of excess government -- **_and we all know there’s plenty to be trimmed!_** \-- Biden’s _American Families Plan_ includes reversing many of President Trump’s historic tax cuts and **_nearly doubling_** the capital gains tax for some Americans. **_Unsurprisingly, the further you dive into the details of his plan the more absurd it gets!_** Like some twisted version of **“newspeak”** straight out of George Orwell’s **_1984_** , the Biden administration has decided that **“infrastructure”** is now defined as anything under the sun. We’ll wait and see if he decides to address the on-going crisis on our southern border in any meaningful way, but I won’t hold my breath. [**We need every single America First patriot we can muster to join the fight to stop the madness, and donate to our April Moneybomb today!**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RmNbt2D7AJDuImySm0mAihSqH1BLn8KxtpS_d0KBoR9d1G-TGGMCrapGFvNz4gjjhQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom&n=2 "Chip in to MAGA Mo today!")****[****](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RmNbt2D7AJDuImySm0mAihSqH1BLn8KxtpS_d0KBoR9d1G-TGGMCrapGFvNz4gjjhQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom&n=3 "Send a Fearless Fighter to the U.S. Senate!")**If Biden’s first 100 days are any indication of what the next 4 years will look like, we CANNOT afford to lose this seat.** We **_MUST_** take back the House & Senate, and put an end to this madness.[****](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RmNbt2D7AJDuImySm0mAihSS8Rb0vZhBTgo14ICoq8meA&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom&n=4)[**Whether you can give $500, $250, $125, $50, or even just $5 or $10, we need YOUR help today!**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RmNbt2D7AJDuImySm0mAihSqH1BLn8KxtpS_d0KBoR9d1G-TGGMCrapGFvNz4gjjhQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom&n=5 "Donate now to join the fight!") There’s not a moment to waste.

Mo Brooks

[**P.S. -- I know it sounds cliché, but your donation TRULY keeps our campaign afloat. The America First movement isn’t beholden to the corporate class or any special interests. It’s beholden to folks like YOU, and we need your help.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RmNbt2D7AJDuImySm0mAihSqH1BLn8KxtpS_d0KBoR9d1G-TGGMCrapGFvNz4gjjhQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom&n=6 "Donate now to support

America First!")
